title_cn: 惊悚！一情侣在北榄府（Samut Prakan）非法赌场遭50人围殴致重伤
summary_cn: 33岁男子向求助机构“Sai Mai Must Survive”求援，自述于3月21日与女友前往北榄府（Samut Prakan）一处非法赌场玩“骰宝（Hi-Lo）”时，遭到场内超过50名男子疯狂殴打，导致两人深受重伤。受害者已向负责人埃卡普（Ekaphop Lueangprasert）提交相关线索。此案再次暴露出泰国地方非法博彩业背后的黑恶势力问题，目前有关部门已介入调查。提醒在泰人士远离非法赌博场所。

title: 曼谷骄傲节游行定于5月31日举办 (Bangkok Pride Parade)
desc: The Bangkok Pride Parade is scheduled for May 31 as Thailand bids to host World Pride 2030.
desc_original: The Bangkok Pride Parade is scheduled for May 31 as Thailand bids to host World Pride 2030.
title_cn: 曼谷骄傲节游行定于5月31日举办 (Bangkok Pride Parade)
summary_cn: 曼谷骄傲节游行（Bangkok Pride Parade）定于2026年5月31日举行。此次活动不仅是泰国民间团体的盛大集会，更是泰国争取主办2030年世界骄傲节（World Pride 2030）的重要举措。届时预计将吸引大量国内外游客参与，展示泰国对多元文化的包容。旅泰外籍人士及游客需留意当日曼谷市中心的交通管制。

title: 多方联合出资保护宋卡湖 (Songkhla Lake) 濒危伊洛瓦底豚
desc: Efforts are being stepped up to protect the critically endangered Irrawaddy dolphins in Songkhla Lake, where the local population has dwindled to just 14.
desc_original: Efforts are being stepped up to protect the critically endangered Irrawaddy dolphins in Songkhla Lake, where the local population has dwindled to just 14.
title_cn: 多方联合出资保护宋卡湖 (Songkhla Lake) 濒危伊洛瓦底豚
summary_cn: 泰国相关部门正加大力度保护宋卡湖（Songkhla Lake）中极度濒危的伊洛瓦底豚（Irrawaddy dolphins）。目前当地该品种海豚的数量已锐减至仅剩14头。通过多方联合注资，保护计划将包括加强栖息地巡查、改善水质以及与当地渔民合作减少意外捕捞，旨在防止这一珍稀物种在当地水域灭绝。

title: 曼谷官员共商对策解决邦坤天区 (Bang Khunthian) 猴群扰民问题
desc: The Bangkok Metropolitan Administration (BMA) has joined forces with the Prime Minister's Office and the Department of National Parks, Wildlife and Plant Conservation (DNP) to discuss ways to handle the encounters between crab-eating macaques in Bang Khunthian district and local residents.
desc_original: The Bangkok Metropolitan Administration (BMA) has joined forces with the Prime Minister's Office and the Department of National Parks, Wildlife and Plant Conservation (DNP) to discuss ways to handle the encounters between crab-eating macaques in Bang Khunthian district and local residents.
title_cn: 曼谷官员共商对策解决邦坤天区 (Bang Khunthian) 猴群扰民问题
summary_cn: 曼谷市政府（BMA）联手总理府及国家公园野生动植物保护厅（DNP），商讨如何应对曼谷邦坤天区（Bang Khunthian）食蟹猕猴与当地居民之间的冲突。随着猴群数量增长和栖息地重叠，入室抢食和伤人事件频发。官方计划通过节育、迁移或设立专门喂养区等手段进行综合治理，平衡生态平衡与公共安全。

title: 泰国交通违章全线严查：4月1日起正式开启罚款模式
desc: March 31 will be the final day of the "warning-before-fines" period for traffic offences, with full legal enforcement set to begin on April 1, the government said.
desc_original: March 31 will be the final day of the "warning-before-fines" period for traffic offences, with full legal enforcement set to begin on April 1, the government said.
title_cn: 泰国交通违章全线严查：4月1日起正式开启罚款模式
summary_cn: 泰国政府宣布，为期数月的交通违法“先警告后罚款”过渡期将于3月31日正式结束。从2026年4月1日起，全国警察将对各类违章行为（如超速、闯红灯、不佩戴头盔等）实施全面法律强制执行，并直接开具罚单。此举旨在改善泼水节前夕的道路安全。提醒在泰驾驶外籍人士严格遵守规章，以免面临由于刚性执法带来的高额罚金。

title: 泰国石油与能源研究会 (PTIT) 否认炼油厂利用地缘冲突牟取暴利
desc: The Petroleum and Energy Institute of Thailand (PTIT) has denied an allegation that oil refineries are reaping a profit following a surge in their gross refinery margin (GRM) during the Mideast conflict, which is driving up domestic oil prices.
desc_original: The Petroleum and Energy Institute of Thailand (PTIT) has denied an allegation that oil refineries are reaping a profit following a surge in their gross refinery margin (GRM) during the Mideast conflict, which is driving up domestic oil prices.
title_cn: 泰国石油与能源研究会 (PTIT) 否认炼油厂利用地缘冲突牟取暴利
summary_cn: 面对公众对国内油价飙升的质疑，泰国石油与能源研究会（PTIT）作出回应，否认炼油厂在冲突期间利用炼油毛利（GRM）激增来牟取暴利。PTIT指出，近期油价上涨主要受地缘冲突导致的中东原油成本增加驱动。机构强调，炼油毛利反映的是全球成品油价差，并非企业的纯利润，且面临成本波动风险，呼吁通过市场化手段理解电价与能源支出逻辑。

title: 泰国商会呼吁采取措施抑制燃料价格上涨
desc: The Thai Chamber of Commerce is calling on the government to manage fuel prices, ensure adequate reserves, and speed up the implementation of energy-saving measures nationwide.
desc_original: The Thai Chamber of Commerce is calling on the government to manage fuel prices, ensure adequate reserves, and speed up the implementation of energy-saving measures nationwide.
summary_cn: 泰国商会（Thai Chamber of Commerce）正式呼吁政府加强对燃料价格的管理，以应对当前能源成本上涨带来的风险。商会建议政府应确保国内能源储备充足，并要求加快在全国范围内实施节能减排措施。此举旨在减轻企业生产支出压力，保护泰国出口竞争力和国内供应链抵御外部油价波动的能力。
title_cn: 泰国商会呼吁采取措施抑制燃料价格上涨

title: 燃油补贴削减引发股市版图变动：几家欢喜几家愁
desc: Thailand's move to rein in petrol price subsidies is likely to reshape sector dynamics, with fuel retailers emerging as key beneficiaries, while the transport, retail and tourism sectors face rising cost pressures, analysts say.
desc_original: Thailand's move to rein in petrol price subsidies is likely to reshape sector dynamics, with fuel retailers emerging as key beneficiaries, while the transport, retail and tourism sectors face rising cost pressures, analysts say.
summary_cn: 随着泰国政府逐步削减汽油价格补贴，股市板块反应不一。分析人士指出，燃油零售商有望因利润空间恢复而获益，但交通运输、零售以及作为经济支柱的旅游业则面临成本激增的压力。此举反映了泰国政府在减轻财政负担与稳定市场物价之间的平衡考量，投资者需警惕高生活成本对民间消费的后续冲击。
title_cn: 燃油补贴削减引发股市版图变动：几家欢喜几家愁

title: 原油价格考验GDP及通胀目标，柴油恐升至60铢
desc: The government is advised to adopt a managed float approach to deal with energy prices amid expectations that domestic diesel prices could reach 60 baht per litre.
desc_original: The government is advised to adopt a managed float approach to deal with energy prices amid expectations that domestic diesel prices could reach 60 baht per litre.
summary_cn: 面对国内柴油价格可能攀升至每升60泰铢（Baht）的极端预期，经济专家建议政府采取“管理浮动机制”来应对能源价格波动。若能源成本持续走高，不仅将推高通胀，还将直接威胁泰国全年的GDP增长目标。此政策建议旨在避免过度消耗燃油基金财政补贴，同时减缓生活成本上升给泰国民众带来的剧痛。
title_cn: 原油价格考验GDP及通胀目标，柴油恐升至60铢

title: 泰国政府誓推东南亚首家迪士尼乐园（Disneyland）落户EEC
desc: The government remains committed to bringing the first Disneyland theme park to Southeast Asia as part of the EEC Capital City project, with potential investors from the Middle East already indicating interest in becoming partners.
desc_original: The government remains committed to bringing the first Disneyland theme park to Southeast Asia as part of the EEC Capital City project, with potential investors from the Middle East already indicating interest in becoming partners.
summary_cn: 泰国政府正积极推动在东部经济走廊（EEC）新城项目中建设东南亚首座迪士尼乐园（Disneyland）。据悉，目前来自中东的潜在投资者已表达了明确的合作意向。这一旗舰型旅游项目旨在提升泰国的核心竞争力，吸引全球高端游客，并将其打造为区域内的娱乐地标，进一步促进中东资本对泰国基建的投入。
title_cn: 泰国政府誓推东南亚首家迪士尼乐园（Disneyland）落户EEC

title: 宋干节出行安全计划发布：2654万辆次车流量预警
desc: The Ministry of Transport has unveiled its comprehensive plan to manage traffic and ensure safety during the upcoming Songkran festival, with an estimated 26.54 million vehicles travelling across the country between April 10–19.
desc_original: The Ministry of Transport has unveiled its comprehensive plan to manage traffic and ensure safety during the upcoming Songkran festival, with an estimated 26.54 million vehicles travelling across the country between April 10–19.
summary_cn: 泰国交通部发布了2026年宋干节（Songkran）全国交通安全管理综合方案。据预测，在4月10日至19日的泼水节期间，全国交通负荷将达到2654万辆次。政府将加强各主要公路的监测与事故预防，确保民众出行安全及物流顺畅。在泰华人及游客应提前规划行程，避开高峰时段，严格遵守期间的交通管制措施。
title_cn: 宋干节出行安全计划发布：2654万辆次车流量预警

title: 柴油燃料价格飙升：泰国企业直呼“压力山大”
desc: Business operators across Thailand have cried foul over the sudden spike in diesel and fuel prices, saying the surge has intensified already mounting cost pressures and is forcing some to consider price hikes or cutbacks.
desc_original: Business operators across Thailand have cried foul over the sudden spike in diesel and fuel prices, saying the surge has intensified already mounting cost pressures and is forcing some to consider price hikes or cutbacks.
title_cn: 柴油燃料价格飙升：泰国企业直呼“压力山大”
summary_cn: 泰国各地商业经营者对柴油和燃料价格的突然飙升表示强烈抗议。价格上涨加剧了早已沉重的成本压力。许多企业主表示，由于运输和运营成本失控，他们正被迫考虑提高商品价格或削减经营规模，这对泰国整体物价稳定构成直接挑战。

title: 泰国人口萎缩至 6580 万：曼谷人口密度依然高企
desc: Thailand's population fell to 65.8 million in 2025, according to the Department of Provincial Administration, which also revealed that Bangkok remains by far the country's most populous area.
desc_original: Thailand's population fell to 65.8 million in 2025, according to the Department of Provincial Administration, which also revealed that Bangkok remains by far the country's most populous area.
title_cn: 泰国人口降至 6580 万：曼谷（Bangkok）仍为人口最稠密地区
summary_cn: 根据泰国地方行政厅（Department of Provincial Administration）最新披露的数据，截至2025年，泰国总人口已缩减至6580万。数据显示曼谷（Bangkok）依然是全国人口最密集的地区。这反映了泰国日益严峻的老龄化和低出生率挑战，可能对未来劳动力市场和政府公共预算产生长远影响。

title: 物流乱象频发：能源危机恐波及宋干节零售市场
desc: A fuel shortage and a recent surge in prices have caused logistics chaos for provincial retail and wholesale operators, sparking concerns it will reduce foot traffic during the upcoming Songkran festival in April.
desc_original: A fuel shortage and a recent surge in prices have caused logistics chaos for provincial retail and wholesale operators, sparking concerns it will reduce foot traffic during the upcoming Songkran festival in April.
title_cn: 能源短缺导致物流乱象：外府零售商忧心宋干节（Songkran）生意
summary_cn: 由于燃料短缺及价格暴涨，泰国各府的零售和批发商正陷入物流混乱之中。随着4月宋干节（Songkran）临近，商家担心不断上升的成本将打击民众的出行与消费欲望，从而导致这一黄金旅游季节的人流量和销售额大幅下降，影响地方经济复苏。

title: 泰国政府取消燃油补贴，力保国家信用评级展望稳定
desc: The government's decision to abolish blanket fuel price subsidies helps reduce the possibility Thailand will face a credit downgrade, even though the measure could pressure fragile domestic consumption and push inflation to rise.
desc_original: The government's decision to abolish blanket fuel price subsidies helps reduce the possibility Thailand will face a credit downgrade, even though the measure could pressure fragile domestic consumption and push inflation to rise.
title_cn: 泰国取消全民燃油补贴，虽抗通胀压力增大但利于信用评级
summary_cn: 泰国政府决定取消全面燃油价格补贴措施，此举旨在优化财政结构，降低国家信用评级被下调的风险。然而，由于此举将推高物流和生活成本，专家警告这可能会进一步压制本就脆弱的国内消费，并推动通胀率上行，加重普通民众负担。

title: 中东冲突影响波及泰股：布罗朗证券称行业影响不一
desc: The ongoing Middle East conflict is emerging as a key risk to Thailand's equity market, but its impact on corporate earnings is uneven, creating both winners and losers across sectors, according to Bualuang Securities (BLS).
desc_original: The ongoing Middle East conflict is emerging as a key risk to Thailand's equity market, but its impact on corporate earnings is uneven, creating both winners and losers across sectors, according to Bualuang Securities (BLS).
title_cn: 中东冲突成为泰股关键风险：布罗朗证券（Bualuang Securities）解析板块分化
summary_cn: 布罗朗证券（Bualuang Securities）指出，持续的中东冲突已成为泰国股市面临的主要风险。然而，冲突对上市企业盈余的影响并不均衡。能源等上游行业可能受益，而航空、零售等极度依赖成本控制的行业则面临负面冲击。这要求投资者针对不同板块采取更为谨慎的投资策略。

title: 尽管地缘冲突持续，泰国医院业（Thai hospital）仍将迎来增长潮
desc_original: Though patients from the Middle East are shrinking as a result of war, analysts are upbeat about prospects for Thai hospitals this year as the country has emerged as a medical and wellness hub and is transitioning into a "super-aged" society.
summary_cn: 虽然受中东地区冲突影响，来自该地区的患者数量有所减少，但分析师仍看好泰国医院今年的前景。泰国已确立其作为全球医疗与康养中心（Medical and Wellness Hub）的地位，且国内正步入“超高龄社会”，医疗配套需求旺盛，预计医疗产业将持续蓬勃发展。
title_cn: 尽管地缘冲突持续，泰国医院业（Thai hospital）仍将迎来增长潮

title: 泰国军方严阵以待，警告边境挑衅行为
desc_original: Thai marines have stepped up monitoring along the Thai-Cambodian border after reports of renewed provocations, with commanders warning any further violations could prompt a response.
summary_cn: 因近期频繁出现挑衅报道，泰国海军陆战队已加强对泰柬边境（Thai-Cambodian border）的监控。前线指挥官发出严厉警告，称任何进一步的侵犯行为都将遭到泰方的反击。目前边境敏感地区的监视力度已显著提升，以防止局势进一步升级。
title_cn: 泰国军方严阵以待，警告边境挑衅行为

title: 8名从伊朗撤离的泰国公民预计明日抵泰
desc_original: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA) said that eight Thai nationals evacuated from Iran are due to arrive home tomorrow, raising the total number of Thais assisted in leaving the Middle East since the latest conflict erupted there to 1,499.
summary_cn: 泰国政府外交部（MFA）表示，8名从伊朗疏散的泰国公民定于明日回国。自中东地区近期爆发冲突以来，泰国政府已累计向1,499名泰国籍公民提供协助撤离。政府正持续关注当地局势，确保受影响海外公民的安全与回国事宜。
title_cn: 8名从伊朗撤离的泰国公民预计明日抵泰

title: 宋干节期间泰国航司航班量将激增
desc_original: Aeronautical Radio of Thailand (Aerothai) has forecast a surge in air travel during the Songkran holiday, with more than 25,000 flights expected nationwide during April 10–19.
summary_cn: 泰国航空无线电有限公司（Aerothai）预估，在即将到来的宋干节（Songkran）假期期间，全国航空旅行将迎来高峰。预计在4月10日至19日期间，全国范围内的航班总量将超过25,000架次。计划出行的游客需提前规划，应对假期期间的客流高峰。
title_cn: 宋干节期间泰国航司航班量将激增

title: 希捷科技（Seagate）深耕泰国，助力AI基础设施升级
desc_original: Amid geopolitical uncertainty, Seagate Technology is reinforcing Thailand as a strategic base by upgrading manufacturing with advanced technologies to support artificial intelligence (AI)-driven data infrastructure.
summary_cn: 在全球地缘政治不确定的背景下，硬盘巨头希捷科技（Seagate Technology）重申泰国为其关键战略基地。公司计划引入先进制造技术升级泰国工厂，以支持日益增长的AI驱动数据基础设施需求。此举不仅巩固了泰国在全球科技供应链中的地位，也预示着泰国高端制造业的转型。
title_cn: 希捷科技（Seagate）深耕泰国，助力AI基础设施升级

title: 泰国内阁批准减缓燃油价格上涨影响的纾困措施
desc: The caretaker cabinet on Thursday approved a series of measures aimed at easing the impact of soaring fuel prices on households and businesses, ranging from welfare card top-ups to soft loans for small businesses.
desc_original: The caretaker cabinet on Thursday approved a series of measures aimed at easing the impact of soaring fuel prices on households and businesses, ranging from welfare card top-ups to soft loans for small businesses.
title_cn: 泰国内阁批准纾困措施减缓燃油成本压力
summary_cn: 泰国看守内阁周四批准了一系列纾困措施，旨在缓解燃油价格飙升对家庭和企业的影响。措施包括增加国家福利卡（Welfare Card）的补贴金额，以及为小型企业提供低息软贷款。此举是在全球能源成本上涨背景下，政府为稳定国内物价、减轻民众生活负担而采取的紧急行政干预。

title: Hyrox brings out all of Bangkok
desc: For three days in late March, BITEC felt charged with a kind of energy Bangkok has become increasingly good at generating: collective, slightly feverish, and impossible to watch from a distance without wanting to lean in. HYROX returned to the city from March 20 to 22, filling the venue with athletes, supporters, first-timers, relay teams, gym friends and curious onlookers, all drawn into the...
desc_original: For three days in late March, BITEC felt charged with a kind of energy Bangkok has become increasingly good at generating: collective, slightly feverish, and impossible to watch from a distance without wanting to lean in. HYROX returned to the city from March 20 to 22, filling the venue with athletes, supporters, first-timers, relay teams, gym friends and curious onlookers, all drawn into the...
title_cn: HYROX 室内体能赛登陆曼谷 BITEC 会展中心
summary_cn: 三月下旬，知名室内体能耐力赛事 HYROX 再次回到了曼谷，于3月20日至22日在曼谷国际贸易展览中心（BITEC）举行。为期三天的活动吸引了大量专业运动员、接力队伍、健身爱好者及旁观者参与。现场气氛热烈，展现了曼谷日益增长的集体健身热潮。该赛事融合了跑步与功能性健身训练，已成为当地运动社交圈的年度盛事。

title: Oil fund defends sudden steep price hikes
desc: The Oil Fuel Fund Office has defended the sharp six‑baht rise in fuel prices across Thailand, saying the increase was driven by soaring global oil prices and the need to maintain the fund’s financial stability.
desc_original: The Oil Fuel Fund Office has defended the sharp six‑baht rise in fuel prices across Thailand, saying the increase was driven by soaring global oil prices and the need to maintain the fund’s financial stability.
title_cn: 燃油基金维护陡升 6 泰铢燃油价格上涨之决定
summary_cn: 泰国石油燃料基金办公室（OFFO）针对近期全国范围内每升燃油大涨 6 泰铢的举措进行了辩护。该部门表示，此次猛烈调价是受全球原油价格飙升迫使，且为了维持基金自身的财务稳定性及长期补贴能力。此举引发了各界对通胀压力增加的广泛关注，反映了泰国在能源补贴与财政健康之间的艰难博弈。

title: Prices frozen for necessary consumer products
desc: The prices of some necessary consumer products will be frozen while those of other products will rise, according to Commerce Minister Suphajee Suthumpun.
desc_original: The prices of some necessary consumer products will be frozen while those of other products will rise, according to Commerce Minister Suphajee Suthumpun.
title_cn: 商务部对泰国日用必需品实施价格冻结
summary_cn: 泰国商务部长苏帕吉（Suphajee Suthumpun）表示，政府决定对部分生活必需品实施价格冻结政策，以减轻通胀对民众的影响。虽然部分非必需商品的价格可能随市场波动上涨，但关系民生的核心产品将保持价格稳定。此举旨在平衡生产成本上涨与保障消费者生活质量之间的矛盾。

title: New movies out this week: Mar 26 - Apr 1
desc: 6 new releases that hit cinemas in Thailand this week.
desc_original: 6 new releases that hit cinemas in Thailand this week.
title_cn: 本周泰国新片上映指南：3月26日至4月1日
summary_cn: 本周（3月26日至4月1日）泰国院线共有 6 部新片上映，涵盖了多种题材和风格。游客及当地居民可前往各大院线体验泰国成熟的影院文化。该列表为影迷提供了清明及四月初期间的观影选择指南，反映了泰国电影市场的多样性与活跃度。

title: 版方指控泰国出版社 BURAPAT 未经授权销售《火凤燎原》漫画
desc: Rights holder accuses Thai publisher of unlicensed comics sales Legacy Tong Li Publishing Co., Ltd issued a Thai-language statement today, March 26, alleging that Thailand-based publisher BURAPAT COMICS has been printing, distributing and selling the comic Hongsa Chom Rachan without legal authorisation. Hongsa Chom Rachan is the Thai release of The Ravages of Time , a Chinese-language historical comic series from Hong Kong set in the Three Kingdoms era that has been popular with Thai readers for about 20 years. Tong Li said it previously granted BURAPAT COMICS rights to publish Thai editions o
desc_original: Rights holder accuses Thai publisher of unlicensed comics sales Legacy Tong Li Publishing Co., Ltd issued a Thai-language statement today, March 26, alleging that Thailand-based publisher BURAPAT COMICS has been printing, distributing and selling the comic Hongsa Chom Rachan without legal authorisation. Hongsa Chom Rachan is the Thai release of The Ravages of Time , a Chinese-language historical comic series from Hong Kong set in the Three Kingdoms era that has been popular with Thai readers for about 20 years. Tong Li said it previously granted BURAPAT COMICS rights to publish Thai editions o
summary_cn: 东立出版社（Tong Li Publishing）于3月26日发布声明，指控泰国出版社 BURAPAT COMICS 未经法律授权，擅自印刷、发行及销售漫画《火凤燎原》（Ravages of Time）。该漫画是以三国时代为背景的香港出版中文历史题材作品，在泰国已流行约20年。东立称此前曾授予 BURAPAT 泰语版出版权，但目前相关行为已构成侵权。这是泰国出版界针对版权保护的一次重要声明。
title_cn: 版方指控泰国出版社 BURAPAT 未经授权销售《火凤燎原》漫画

title: 由于油价飞涨，曼谷公交船和渡轮将于3月30日起调涨2铢
desc: Bangkok canal and river boats to raise fares by 2 baht from March 30 Legacy Passenger boat operators on Bangkok’s Saen Saep Canal and the Chao Phraya River will increase fares by two baht from Monday, March 30, citing higher diesel costs after an 18% jump in fuel prices. Family Transport (2002) Ltd, which operates the Saen Saep Canal service between Wat Sri Boonruang and Phan Fah Lilat Bridge, said fares will rise from 11-21 baht to 13-23 baht depending on distance. Managing director Chaowalit Methayaprapas said diesel B7 rose on March 26 by 6 baht per litre to 38.94 baht per litre, increasing
desc_original: Bangkok canal and river boats to raise fares by 2 baht from March 30 Legacy Passenger boat operators on Bangkok’s Saen Saep Canal and the Chao Phraya River will increase fares by two baht from Monday, March 30, citing higher diesel costs after an 18% jump in fuel prices. Family Transport (2002) Ltd, which operates the Saen Saep Canal service between Wat Sri Boonruang and Phan Fah Lilat Bridge, said fares will rise from 11-21 baht to 13-23 baht depending on distance. Managing director Chaowalit Methayaprapas said diesel B7 rose on March 26 by 6 baht per litre to 38.94 baht per litre, increasing
summary_cn: 因柴油价格飙升18%，曼谷空盛桑运河（Saen Saep Canal）和湄南河（Chao Phraya River）的客运船运营商宣布将从3月30日（周一）起调涨票价2泰铢。负责空盛桑运河航线的 Family Transport 有限公司表示，票价将从原来的11-21泰铢上调至13-23泰铢。本次调价主因是B7柴油价格已涨至每升38.94泰铢，导致运营成本大幅增加。这也是曼谷市民日常通勤面临的物价压力体现。
location_detail: Saen Saep Canal, Chao Phraya River
title_cn: 由于油价飞涨，曼谷公交船和渡轮将于3月30日起调涨2铢

title: The Zero 在普吉岛推行生态智能住宅新模式
desc: The Zero pioneers a new era of eco-smart residential living in Phuket Legacy Phuket is one of the world’s most desirable destinations for couples and families who want to leave their busy urban lives behind and write a new chapter of their story in paradise. Now, one pioneering British company is giving eco-conscious international investors the chance to escape to this tropical Thai island and live in harmony with the environment. Founded in London in 2019, The Zero set an unprecedented benchmark for sustainable living with Zero London, its sell-out zero-carbon project in the UK capital. Havin
desc_original: The Zero pioneers a new era of eco-smart residential living in Phuket Legacy Phuket is one of the world’s most desirable destinations for couples and families who want to leave their busy urban lives behind and write a new chapter of their story in paradise. Now, one pioneering British company is giving eco-conscious international investors the chance to escape to this tropical Thai island and live in harmony with the environment. summary_cn: 英国先锋建筑公司 The Zero 进军普吉岛（Phuket），推广生态智能住宅生活方式。成立于2019年的 The Zero 此前在伦敦成功开发了首个零碳住宅项目。此次该公司看中普吉岛作为全球最理想移居地的巨大潜力，旨在为有环保意识的国际投资者提供与自然环境和谐共处的岛屿生活方案。该项目结合了先进的智慧家居系统与可持续建筑技术，标志着泰国高端度假房产市场向低碳化迈进。
title_cn: The Zero 在普吉岛推行生态智能住宅新模式

The allegations involve a 65 year old senior monk, Somchai Taechapanyo, and a man identified as Chon. Somchai was described as the chief monk of Chiang Khan district and the abbot of Si Sawang Dham Temple. Chon was reportedly acting as

title: 泰国巴真府桥头深夜发生枪击案，造成一名青少年死亡两名受伤
desc: Pathum Thani shooting leaves one teen dead and two wounded Legacy A teenager was shot dead , and two others were wounded in a shooting today, March 26, on Rangsit–Nakhon Nayok Road in Thanyaburi, Pathum Thani. A witness said the gunmen returned to fire again after the victim fell from a motorbike. Police at Thanyaburi station received the report at about 3am, after shots were fired on a bridge over Khlong 11 in Bueng Nam Raksa as the victims were travelling towards Rangsit. At the scene, police found the body of 17 year old Phon along the footpath on the bridge. He had been shot four times, wi

summary_cn: 3月26日凌晨3时许，巴吞他尼府（Pathum Thani）探耶武里县（Thanyaburi）发生一起惨烈枪击。在兰实-那空那育路（Rangsit-Nakhon Nayok Road）横跨11渠的桥上，枪手袭击了一辆行驶中的摩托车。17岁少年 Phon 身中四枪当场身亡，另有两名同伴受伤。据目击者称，受害者落车后枪手还折返回场补枪。当地警方目前正调取监控并追捕在逃嫌疑人，案件疑因青少年帮派冲突引起。
title_cn: 泰国巴真府桥头深夜发生枪击案，造成一名青少年死亡两名受伤

title: 外籍女司机普吉岛（Phuket）驾驶皮卡撞人，致泰国摩托车手一死一伤

Phuket Times Facebook page reported that the fatal crash happened at about 5pm. Video of the incident circulated on Thai social media today, but the identities of those involved have not been disclosed. In the clip, the foreign woman was seen driving a blue pickup that suddenly slid to the right and collided with two motorcycles travelling in the opposite lane. The pickup then
summary_cn: 3月25日下午5时许，普吉岛查龙区（Chalong）发生一起惨烈交通事故。一名外籍女子驾驶的蓝色皮卡车在行驶中突然失控偏向右侧，撞上了对向行驶的两辆摩托车。事故导致一名泰国男子当场身亡，另一名摩托车手受伤。相关行车记录仪画面已在社交媒体上流传，但涉案外籍人士的身份尚未公布。目前警方正介入调查事故具体原因。
title_cn: 外籍女司机普吉岛（Phuket）驾驶皮卡撞人，致泰国摩托车手一死一伤

title: 北榄府（Samut Prakan）公寓突发大火，疑似微波炉无人看守引发
desc_original: Unattended microwave suspected in Samut Prakan apartment fire Legacy An unattended microwave is suspected to have caused a fire in Samut Prakan yesterday, March 25, at a five-storey apartment building in Mueang Samut Prakan district, prompting firefighters to evacuate residents . Fire crews from Pak Nam Municipality and nearby areas responded with nearly 10 fire engines, supported by rescue and medical volunteers, as residents were moved to a safe point. Fire firefighters hauled hoses up to the rooftop and worked inside the room to bring the situation under control. The flames were extinguished in
summary_cn: 3月25日，泰国北榄府（Samut Prakan）直辖县一座五层公寓楼发生火灾。当地消防部门出动10余辆消防车赶赴现场，迅速疏散楼内住户并展开扑救。火势随后被控制在起火房间内。据初步调查，火灾疑因住户使用微波炉时无人看守导致短路或过热引发。此次事故提醒在泰居住者注意电器安全。

title_cn: 北榄府（Samut Prakan）公寓突发大火，疑似微波炉无人看守引发

title: 新加坡海南鸡饭魅力何在？为何赴新泰国游客仍乐于排队
desc_original: Why Thai travellers keep queuing for Singapore’s Hainanese chicken rice Legacy Chicken rice is sold on almost every street corner in Thailand for under 70 baht. You can find it from morning until midnight. So why is it that every time Thai people travel to Singapore, chicken rice ends up on the first list of must-eat dishes, to the point where some say you have not really reached the Merlion land if you have not tried it? Some famous stalls even require people to queue for more than an hour for a single plate. The answer is not just branding, but it also comes down to ingredients and technique
summary_cn: 虽然海南鸡饭在泰国街头随处可见且价格亲民（通常低于70泰铢），但泰国游客前往新加坡旅行时，海南鸡饭仍是必吃清单上的首选。许多知名摊位甚至需排队一小时以上。究其原因，除了品牌效应外，新加坡海南鸡饭在选材、烹饪技巧及搭配酱料上与泰式款式有所不同，这种文化相似中的差异性吸引了大量食客前去打卡。
title_cn: 新加坡海南鸡饭魅力何在？为何赴新泰国游客仍乐于排队

title: 普吉岛（Phuket）保时捷维修中心员工见财起意，偷窃客户价值50万泰铢劳力士
desc_original: Porsche service centre worker in Phuket steals client’s Rolex watch Legacy A worker at a Porsche service centre in Phuket returned a stolen Rolex watch worth nearly 500,000 baht after police identified him through fingerprints found inside the vehicle. A Thai woman said on Facebook that her son’s Rolex, valued at 479,000 baht, went missing from a storage compartment inside her white Porsche Taycan GTS after the car was sent to a service centre on Bypass Road, Phuket, on March 23. She said her son borrowed the car on March 22 and left the watch in a compartment in the centre console next
summary_cn: 普吉岛一名保时捷车主报警称，其保时捷 Taycan GTS 送往 Bypass 路维修中心保养后，车内价值约47.9万泰铢的劳力士手表不翼而飞。警方通过车内留下的指纹迅速锁定目标，最终迫使维修中心的一名员工交还了被盗手表。车主曾发文提醒民众，贵重财物送修前务必妥善保管，切勿遗留在车内。
title_cn: 普吉岛（Phuket）保时捷维修中心员工见财起意，偷窃客户价值50万泰铢劳力士

title: 泰国逮捕中国通缉犯，涉案九亿躲藏曼谷邦纳（Bang Na）豪宅
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月26日，泰国移民局透露，中国驻泰国大使馆此前曾向泰国通报，中国籍男子王某...最终，调查人员锁定了一栋位于Bang Na地区、价值超过5000万泰铢的豪华别墅...随后，王某被逮捕并移送外国人拘留中心，等待遣返回中国。
summary_cn: 3月26日，泰国移民局宣布逮捕一名遭中方通缉的经济犯罪嫌疑人王某。通报显示，王某涉案金额高达9亿人民币。泰国警方根据使馆线索锁定曼谷邦纳（Bang Na）一栋价值5000万泰铢的豪华别墅并将王某抓获。王某目前被拘留在外国人拘留中心，近期将履行遣返程序。此案彰显了中泰两国在打击跨境犯罪方面的合作紧密。
title_cn: 泰国逮捕中国通缉犯，涉案九亿躲藏曼谷邦纳（Bang Na）豪宅

title: 泰国交通新规升级：4月起严查10大违法行为
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月26日，据泰媒报道，泰国总理府副发言人艾琳表示，政府高度重视道路交通安全...自2026年4月1日起，交通警察将进入第二阶段，对导致交通事故的10类主要违法行为进行严格执法处罚。
title_cn: 泰国交通新规升级：4月起严查10大违法行为
summary_cn: 泰国政府宣布自2026年4月1日起正式进入交通执法第二阶段。总理府副发言人艾琳（Iris）表示，交警将重点打击导致交通事故的10类核心违法行为，包括超速、酒驾、不佩戴安全帽及非法改装等。此举旨在降低节日及平时的交通事故伤亡率。提醒在泰华人和外籍驾驶者务必遵守当地交规，以免面临高额罚款或法律诉讼。

title: 为泰党提交10部法律草案，力推“新规则”应对“新挑战”
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月25日，泰国为泰党议员育查南及团队在党魁朱拉潘和副党魁初萨的带领下，向国会提交了首批10部法律草案...涵盖生计、安全和平等权利等，必须同步解决。
title_cn: 泰党（Pheu Thai）提交10项法律草案，涵盖民生安全与平等权
summary_cn: 执政党为泰党（Pheu Thai）议员育查南及党魁朱拉潘（Chulaphan）近日正式向国会提交10部核心法律草案。该系列“新规则”法案旨在应对当前多变的社会挑战，内容涉及民众生计改善、社区公共安全、公民平等权利等多个维度。此举标志着政府试图通过系统性立法解决结构性问题，对泰国后续社会治理架构具有深远影响。

title: 2026宋干节去哪玩？泰国人最爱芭提雅
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月26日，全球酒店预订网站Agoda透露，今年泰国传统新年节日“宋干节”的时间是4月13日至15日...芭提雅重回榜首表明游客正在寻找既热闹又熟悉的目的地。
title_cn: 2026年宋干节（Songkran）热力图：芭提雅（Pattaya）成热搜首选
summary_cn: 根据Agoda数据，2026年宋干节（泼水节）期间，芭提雅（Pattaya）再度蝉联泰国境内最受欢迎旅游目的地榜首。今年宋干节假期为4月13日至15日，数据显示当地游客对成熟、热闹景致的需求旺盛。作为热门节点的芭提雅预计将迎来大规模人潮，建议计划前往的华人和游客提前预约住宿。此数据反映了后疫情时代泰国旅游业的稳定复苏态势。

title: 中东局势升级难阻泼水节热潮，泰国预计收入达300亿铢
desc: The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) remains confident about its projection of 6% revenue growth tallying 30 billion baht during the Songkran holiday this year, mainly driven by Asian markets.
desc_original: The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) remains confident about its projection of 6% revenue growth tallying 30 billion baht during the Songkran holiday this year, mainly driven by Asian markets.
summary_cn: 泰国国家旅游局（TAT）表示，尽管中东局势紧张，但对今年泼水节期间的旅游收入保持信心。预计收入将增长6%，总计达到300亿泰铢。这一增长主要由亚洲市场带动，反映出泰国作为区域旅游目的地的强劲韧性。旅游局认为外部冲突对泼水节核心客群的影响有限。
title_cn: 中东局势升级难阻泼水节热潮，泰国预计收入达300亿铢

title: “一人一半”补贴计划获3000亿铢预算支持
desc: Roughly 300 billion baht in investment expenditure is expected to be available for transfer to the central budget to support the "Khon La Khrueng" co-payment scheme and urgent government emergency projects.
desc_original: Roughly 300 billion baht in investment expenditure is expected to be available for transfer to the central budget to support the "Khon La Khrueng" co-payment scheme and urgent government emergency projects.
summary_cn: 泰国政府预计将从投资支出中拨出约3000亿泰铢转入中央预算，以支持“Khon La Khrueng”（一人一半/各付一半）联合支付计划及其他紧急政府项目。该举措旨在通过消费补贴刺激国内经济增长，协助民众应对生活压力。这是政府平衡年度财政预算与突发应急开支的重要手段。
title_cn: “一人一半”补贴计划获3000亿铢预算支持

title: 泰国出台数字平台监管新规，重塑电商竞争格局
desc: After months of anticipation, Thailand has introduced sweeping new trade competition guidelines to govern multi-sided platforms, aiming to reshape the e-commerce landscape.
desc_original: After months of anticipation, Thailand has introduced sweeping new trade competition guidelines to govern multi-sided platforms, aiming to reshape the e-commerce landscape.
summary_cn: 在经历数月的筹备后，泰国正式推出了针对多边数字平台的全新贸易竞争指南。这些规则旨在加强对大型电商及数字平台的监管，防止不公平竞争，促进市场多元化。此举标志着泰国在治理数字经济和优化电子商务环境方面迈出了重要一步，预计将对跨境电商巨头产生直接影响。
title_cn: 泰国出台数字平台监管新规，重塑电商竞争格局

title: 能源委拟提高5-8月电费，提供三档方案征求民意
desc: The Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) is preparing to announce a higher power tariff for May to August once it gathers public input on an appropriate rate amid a war in the Middle East.
desc_original: The Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) is preparing to announce a higher power tariff for May to August once it gathers public input on an appropriate rate amid a war in the Middle East.
summary_cn: 泰国能源监管委员会（ERC）正准备公布5月至8月的电费上调方案。受中东局势造成能源成本上涨的影响，监管部门提供了三档不同的电费标准供公众评议。政府正寻求在维持能源供应稳定与减轻民众生活负担之间取得平衡。此项调整将直接影响在泰居民和企业的夏季用电开支。
title_cn: 能源委拟提高5-8月电费，提供三档方案征求民意

title: 泰忠诚党敦促缩减议员助手配额，每年可省30亿铢
desc: The Thai Pakdee Party has urged both MPs and senators to cut the number of personal assistants from eight to three, saying the move could save up to 3 billion baht annually.
desc_original: The Thai Pakdee Party has urged both MPs and senators to cut the number of personal assistants from eight to three, saying the move could save up to 3 billion baht annually.
summary_cn: 泰忠诚党（Thai Pakdee Party）正式呼吁缩减国会议员及参议员的人事编制，建议将每人的私人助手名额从8名降至3名。该党表示，此举每年可为泰政府节省高达30亿泰铢的财政开支，有助于优化公共资金分配。目前该提案已提交国会审议，反映了减少政府开支的相关政治诉求。
title_cn: 泰忠诚党敦促缩减议员助手配额，每年可省30亿铢

title: 泰国公共卫生部拟限制特定疗程并加强药品管控
title_cn: 泰国公共卫生部（Ministry of Public Health）拟限制特定疗程并加强药品管控
desc: The Ministry of Public Health plans to limit certain treatments, expand telemedicine and tighten pharmaceutical management to cope with mounting resource pressures, as the Middle East war threatens global medical supply chains, permanent secretary Dr Somruek Chungsaman said.
desc_original: The Ministry of Public Health plans to limit certain treatments, expand telemedicine and tighten pharmaceutical management to cope with mounting resource pressures, as the Middle East war threatens global medical supply chains, permanent secretary Dr Somruek Chungsaman said.
summary_cn: 泰国公共卫生部（Ministry of Public Health）常务次长 Somruek Chungsaman 博士表示，受中东战争威胁全球医疗供应链影响，为应对日益增长的资源压力，计划限制某些特定的治疗流程，同时扩大远程医疗应用，并收紧药品管理制度。此举旨在确保医疗资源的合理分配与供应安全。

title: 受宏观压力影响，孔敬府旅游与会展业遭到冲击
title_cn: 受宏观压力影响，孔敬府（Khon Kaen）旅游与会展业遭到冲击
desc: Rising oil prices and the Middle East war are taking a heavy toll on Khon Kaen's tourism and meetings, incentives, conferences and exhibitions (Mice) industries, with widespread cancellations of hotel bookings and seminars.
desc_original: Rising oil prices and the Middle East war are taking a heavy toll on Khon Kaen's tourism and meetings, incentives, conferences and exhibitions (Mice) industries, with widespread cancellations of hotel bookings and seminars.
summary_cn: 由于油价上涨和中东局势不稳，泰国孔敬府（Khon Kaen）的旅游业及会展业（MICE）遭受沉重打击。目前当地已出现大规模的酒店客房退订和研讨会取消现象。作为东北部的交通和商业枢纽，孔敬府的经济复苏前景因国际局势和通胀压力而面临严峻挑战。

title: 民间团体对禁止艾滋病病毒携带者从警规定提出挑战
title_cn: 民间团体对禁止艾滋病病毒（HIV）携带者入警规定提出挑战
desc: Civil society groups are urging the Royal Thai Police to repeal a regulation barring people living with HIV from joining the force.
desc_original: Civil society groups are urging the Royal Thai Police to repeal a regulation barring people living with HIV from joining the force.
summary_cn: 泰国多个民间社会团体正向泰国皇家警察（Royal Thai Police）施压，敦促其废除一项禁止艾滋病病毒（HIV）携带者加入警队的现行法规。支持者认为该规定涉嫌职场歧视，且不符合现代医学对HIV防控的认知，应保障相应人群的就业权利。

title: 泰国商务部加大物价稳定力度，增加受控商品名单
title_cn: 泰国商务部（Ministry of Commerce）加大物价稳定力度，增加受控商品名单
desc: The Ministry of Commerce has unveiled a fresh set of measures to ease the cost of living, increasing the number of controlled goods to 71 and requiring prior approval for price increases on 21 products.
desc_original: The Ministry of Commerce has unveiled a fresh set of measures to ease the cost of living, increasing the number of controlled goods to 71 and requiring prior approval for price increases on 21 products.
summary_cn: 泰国商务部（Ministry of Commerce）发布了一系列旨在减轻民众生活成本的新措施。其中包括将受控商品数量增加至71类，并规定其中21种核心产品提价必须事先获得政府批准。此举旨在通胀压力加剧背景下维持基本民生物价稳定。

title: 全泰油价周四早间暴涨，每升上涨6泰铢
title_cn: 全泰油价周四早间暴涨，每升上涨6泰铢（Baht）
desc: Retail petrol and diesel prices soared by six baht per litre on Thursday morning due to subsidy reduction by the state Oil Fuel Fund Executive Committee on Wednesday.
desc_original: Retail petrol and diesel prices soared by six baht per litre on Thursday morning due to subsidy reduction by the state Oil Fuel Fund Executive Committee on Wednesday.
summary_cn: 2026年3月26日（周四）早间，泰国加油站的零售汽油和柴油价格大幅跳升，每升上涨6泰铢。此次跳涨源于泰国国家石油基金执行委员会于周三决定削减燃料补贴。这对于在泰生活的车主及物流行业而言是巨大的生活成本变动。

title: 阿卡拉资源 Akara 宣称将针对金矿环境补偿裁决提出上诉
desc: Akara Resources Plc says it will appeal a Civil Court ruling ordering the company to compensate villagers for alleged environmental and health impacts linked to its gold mining operations, while reaffirming its compliance with regulatory standards.
desc_original: Akara Resources Plc says it will appeal a Civil Court ruling ordering the company to compensate villagers for alleged environmental and health impacts linked to its gold mining operations, while reaffirming its compliance with regulatory standards.
summary_cn: 阿卡拉资源有限公司（Akara Resources Plc）近日表示，将对民事法院的一项裁决提起上诉。该裁决要求公司为金矿开采对当地村民造成的环境及健康影响支付赔偿金。尽管法院下达了补偿指令，但阿卡拉公司重申，其矿山运营始终严格遵守泰国的监管标准，并对环境指控持保留意见。此案涉及跨国矿业公司与泰国民众之间的长期利益博弈。
title_cn: 阿卡拉资源 Akara 宣称将针对金矿环境补偿裁决提出上诉

title: 反贪机构揭露政府部门耗资2.5亿铢公款出国考察
desc: The Anti-Corruption Organisation of Thailand has urged state agencies to stop overseas study trips that are largely tourism-oriented.
desc_original: The Anti-Corruption Organisation of Thailand has urged state agencies to stop overseas study trips that are largely tourism-oriented.
summary_cn: 泰国反贪腐组织（ACT）敦促政府机构停止那些“挂羊头卖狗肉”的海外考察行程。据调查，多个部门共耗资2.5亿泰铢进行所谓的海外学习，但内容绝大多数与旅游相关。反贪组织指出，这类行为变相挥霍公帑，呼吁政府加强审计并停止审批缺乏实质性学术或政务意义的考察项目。此事引发社会对政府开支效率的讨论。
title_cn: 反贪机构揭露政府部门耗资2.5亿铢公款出国考察

title: 19个泰国国家项目获得澜湄合作（MLCSF）专项资金支持
desc: Nineteen projects from five state agencies have secured funding under the Mekong-Lancang Special Fund (MLCSF) for public health, the green economy and agricultural modernisation.
desc_original: Nineteen projects from five state agencies have secured funding under the Mekong-Lancang Special Fund (MLCSF) for public health, the green economy and agricultural modernisation.
summary_cn: 来自泰国的5个政府机构共19个项目已成功获得澜沧江-湄公河合作专项基金（MLCSF）的支持。这些项目涵盖公共卫生、绿色经济及农业现代化等多个维度。该基金由中国出资设立，旨在推动区域内成员国的共同发展。此次获批标志着中泰两国在可持续发展及区域互联互通领域的合作进一步走深走实。
title_cn: 19个泰国国家项目获得澜湄合作（MLCSF）专项资金支持

title: 议员功·察提加瓦尼（Korn）抨击政府应对燃油危机不力
desc: Democrat list-MP Korn Chatikavanij on Wednesday criticised the government's handling of the fuel supply crisis with shortages in several provinces, saying it has failed to act against alleged hoarding networks.
desc_original: Democrat list-MP Korn Chatikavanij on Wednesday criticised the government's handling of the fuel supply crisis with shortages in several provinces, saying it has failed to act against alleged hoarding networks.
summary_cn: 泰国民主党比例代表联名议员功·察提加瓦尼（Korn Chatikavanij）周三对政府处理燃油供应危機的方式提出猛烈批评。他指出，目前泰国多个省份出现燃油短缺，而政府未能有效打击涉嫌囤积居奇的利益网络。功表示，能源危机正直接推高物价和民众生活成本，政府若不果断采取措施应对囤积行为，经济下行压力将持续加大。
title_cn: 议员功·察提加瓦尼（Korn）抨击政府应对燃油危机不力

title: 尚泰普塔纳 CPN 发布 1100 亿泰铢五年投资战略计划
desc: SET-listed Central Pattana (CPN) has announced its five-year investment plan worth 110 billion baht covering 2026 to 2030.
desc_original: SET-listed Central Pattana (CPN) has announced its five-year investment plan worth 110 billion baht covering 2026 to 2030.
summary_cn: 泰国零售地产巨头尚泰普塔纳（Central Pattana，简称 CPN）宣布了其具有里程碑意义的五年计划。从2026年至2030年期间，该公司将投入1100亿泰铢用于商业综合体及地产开发项目。作为泰交所（SET）上市公司，CPN 此次雄心勃勃的投资预示着对泰国消费市场和旅游房产长期复苏的强力看好，重点将涵盖新商场建设、现有门店升级以及多元化房产项目投入。
title_cn: 尚泰普塔纳 CPN 发布 1100 亿泰铢五年投资战略计划

title: 泰国AI科技公司 Amity 获1亿美元融资并计划上市
desc_original: Amity, a Thailand-founded artificial intelligence (AI) company, has marked Southeast Asia's largest generative AI funding round through the successful completion of a US$100-million Series D fundraising.
title_cn: 泰国人工智能巨头 Amity 完成1亿美元D轮融资，计划启动IPO上市
summary_cn: 在泰国创立的人工智能企业 Amity 宣布成功完成1亿美元的D轮融资，创下东南亚生成式AI（Generative AI）领域最大单笔融资纪录。该公司目前正积极筹备首次公开募股（IPO）。此次融资不仅彰显了泰国科技初创企业在国际资本市场的吸引力，也标志着泰国在区域AI技术竞赛中占据了重要地位。

title: Fuel subsidies threaten Thai credit rating
desc_original: Thailand is at risk of a credit downgrade if the Middle East war drags on for three months, resulting in fuel subsidies amounting to 200 billion baht, says Tisco's Economic Strategy Unit (ESU).
title_cn: 泰斯科 Tisco 警告：若燃油补贴持续增加，泰国国家信用评级将面临下调风险
summary_cn: 泰国泰斯科（Tisco）证券经济战略部（ESU）指出，若中东局势持续紧张超过三个月，可能导致泰国政府面临高达2000亿泰铢的燃油补贴支出。巨大的财政负担可能危及泰国的信用评级。当前泰国政府通过燃油基金维持低油价政策，全球能源波动带来的财政紧缩或直接影响泰国经济稳定性及国际融资成本。

title: SEC escalates case against Bitazza, FreedomVerse
desc_original: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has filed a criminal complaint against Bitazza and FreedomVerse, along with three senior executives, for allegedly operating a digital asset dealer business without proper authorisation, intensifying regulatory scrutiny in the country's fast-evolving crypto sector.
title_cn: 泰国证监会 SEC 刑事起诉 Bitazza 及 FreedomVerse，涉及无照经营数字资产业务
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易委员会（SEC）针对加密货币平台 Bitazza 和 FreedomVerse 及其三名高管提起刑事起诉。指控其在未获得必要授权的情况下经营数字资产经纪业务。此举标志着泰国监管机构对快速发展的加密货币行业加强审计与管控，提醒在泰投资者注意合规性，也折射出泰国政府对金融秩序监管的严厉态度。

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）警方突袭网络赌博窝点，逮捕68名印度籍嫌疑人
desc: Police in Pattaya have dismantled two online gambling networks in a single day with a combined annual turnover of 2.3 billion baht, following separate raids on two villas that netted 68 Indian nationals.
desc_original: Police in Pattaya have dismantled two online gambling networks in a single day with a combined annual turnover of 2.3 billion baht, following separate raids on two villas that netted 68 Indian nationals.
summary_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）警方在一天内成功摧毁了两个大型网络赌博犯罪网络。通过对两处别墅的突击搜查，警方共逮捕了68名印度籍国民。据初步调查，这些非法赌博平台的年营业额高达23亿泰铢。这是泰国当局近期针对外籍非法从业者及跨境网络犯罪打击行动的又一重大进展，反映出对此类治安隐患的高压态势。
title_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）警方突袭网络赌博窝点，逮捕68名印度籍嫌疑人

title: 红统府（Ang Thong）油库案件调查取得新进展，疑似涉及囤积及溢价销售
desc: Police are stepping up an investigation into an oil depot in Ang Thong province after two partner companies submitted key documents, while authorities are also considering whether the case may involve fuel hoarding or sales at prices above controlled levels.
desc_original: Police are stepping up an investigation into an oil depot in Ang Thong province after two partner companies submitted key documents, while authorities are also considering whether the case may involve fuel hoarding or sales at prices above controlled levels.
summary_cn: 泰国警方正加速调查位于红统府（Ang Thong）的一座油库。在两家合作公司提交关键文件后，案件有了新突破。目前，当局正重点调查该油库是否涉及非法囤积燃料，或以高于国家管制价格的金额进行销售。此调查旨在维护泰国能源市场的价格稳定，严厉打击在波动时期伺机牟利的行为。
title_cn: 红统府（Ang Thong）油库案件调查取得新进展，疑似涉及囤积及溢价销售

title: 高端日式铁板烧：曼谷奈乐安缦 Hiori 餐厅开业
desc: Located on the 19th floor of Aman Nai Lert Bangkok as one of two Japanese dining concepts within the Aman Club, Hiori presents an elevated and intimate teppanyaki experience paired with attentive (nigh doting) service.
desc_original: Located on the 19th floor of Aman Nai Lert Bangkok as one of two Japanese dining concepts within the Aman Club, Hiori presents an elevated and intimate teppanyaki experience paired with attentive (nigh doting) service.
summary_cn: 位于曼谷奈乐安缦（Aman Nai Lert Bangkok）19层的新餐厅 Hiori 正式亮相。作为安缦俱乐部（Aman Club）旗下的两家日式高端餐饮概念之一，Hiori 提供了一种独特、精致且私密性极佳的铁板烧体验，并以此为基础搭配贴心周到的管家式服务。这是曼谷奢华餐饮界的又一重磅选择，适合追求高品质旅居生活的群体。
title_cn: 高端日式铁板烧：曼谷奈乐安缦 Hiori 餐厅开业

title: 三月底流媒体新剧指南（3月25-31日）
desc: Looking for a title to binge-watch this weekend? Here's our pick!
desc_original: Looking for a title to binge-watch this weekend? Here's our pick!
summary_cn: 本期指南为您推荐了3月25日至31日期间值得在周末刷剧观影的新剧目录。内容涵盖了泰国及全球主流流媒体平台的最新剧集和电影精选。为在泰生活的海外人士及本地民众提供休闲娱乐参考，是度过宅家时光的好帮手。
title_cn: 三月底流媒体新剧指南（3月25-31日）

title: 亚洲多国因中东战争影响出现航空煤油囤积迹象
desc: Signs are growing that Asian countries are hoarding jet fuel after the Iran war sent oil prices surging, reflecting growing strain on the aviation industry.
desc_original: Signs are growing that Asian countries are hoarding jet fuel after the Iran war sent oil prices surging, reflecting growing strain on the aviation industry.
summary_cn: 随着伊朗战争导致国际原油价格大幅飙升，亚洲多个国家开始出现囤积航空煤油的迹象。这反映了航空业面临的成本压力激增及对供应链中断的担忧。由于航空油料价格直接关联到跨国旅行的机票成本，此类区域性经济动态可能对未来几个月内进出泰国的航司运营及游客出行支出产生连锁反应。
title_cn: 亚洲多国因中东战争影响出现航空煤油囤积迹象

title: 华欣标准酒店（The Standard, Hua Hin）推出玩乐式康养新体验
desc: Since opening its doors in December 2021 and being acquired by Hyatt in 2024, The Standard, Hua Hin, is doing some freshening up with an emphasis on wellness that combines fun and self-care.
desc_original: Since opening its doors in December 2021 and being acquired by Hyatt in 2024, The Standard, Hua Hin, is doing some freshening up with an emphasis on wellness that combines fun and self-care.
title_cn: 华欣标准酒店 (The Standard, Hua Hin) 推出寓教于乐的康养升级服务
summary_cn: 自2021年开业并于2024年被凯悦 (Hyatt) 集团收购后，位于华欣 (Hua Hin) 的 The Standard 酒店正在进行品牌翻新。此次升级的核心在于将“趣味性”与“自我护理”相结合，打破传统康养服务的沉闷感，旨在为游客提供一种轻松、活泼的健康度假体验。

title: Nothing brings Phone (4a) and Headphone (a) to Thailand
desc: London-based tech brand Nothing has officially landed in Thailand with the launch of the Phone (4a) Pro, Phone (4a) and its stylish over‑ear headphones, the Headphone (a), promising premium features at prices that do not require a deep breath or a long chat with your loved ones.
desc_original: London-based tech brand Nothing has officially landed in Thailand with the launch of the Phone (4a) Pro, Phone (4a) and its stylish over‑ear headphones, the Headphone (a), promising premium features at prices that do not require a deep breath or a long chat with your loved ones.
title_cn: 伦敦科技品牌 Nothing 正式进军泰国，发布新款手机与耳机
summary_cn: 总部位于伦敦的潮流科技品牌 Nothing 正式登陆泰国市场，发布了包含 Phone (4a) Pro、Phone (4a) 智能手机以及 Headphone (a) 头戴式耳机在内的多款新品。该品牌以极简工业风著称，此次进入泰国主打高性价比的高级功能，旨在吸引追求时尚与实用性的年轻消费群体。

title: Why the Japanese people love Thais so much, though there are still a few ‘what on earth?’ moments
desc: Why the Japanese people love Thais so much, though there are still a few ‘what on earth?’ moments Legacy According to a regular annual survey by the Japanese Cabinet Office, Thailand consistently ranks among the countries Japanese people feel most warmly towards, usually second only to Taiwan.
desc_original: Why the Japanese people love Thais so much, though there are still a few ‘what on earth?’ moments Legacy According to a regular annual survey by the Japanese Cabinet Office, Thailand consistently ranks among the countries Japanese people feel most warmly towards, usually second only to Taiwan.
title_cn: 民调显示：日本民众对泰国好感度极高，仅次于台湾
summary_cn: 根据日本内阁府的最新的年度调查显示，泰国在日本民众最有好感的国家/地区中始终名列前茅，通常位列第二，仅次于台湾。尽管两国文化中仍存在一些令日本人感到“不可思议”的文化差异，但坚实的经贸联系、丰富的旅游资源以及泰国民众的和善性格，使得泰国成为日本人的首选海外目的地之一。

title: Thai snake rescuer shares safety warning after cobra escapes inside car
desc: Thai snake rescuer shares safety warning after cobra escapes inside car Legacy A Thai snake rescuer and YouTuber shared a video of a cobra emerging inside a moving car.
desc_original: Thai snake rescuer shares safety warning after cobra escapes inside car Legacy A Thai snake rescuer and YouTuber shared a video of a cobra emerging inside a moving car.
title_cn: 惊魂！泰国捕蛇博主发布视频提醒：眼镜蛇在行驶车内现身
summary_cn: 一名泰国捕蛇专家兼 YouTube 博主发布了一段令人心惊肉跳的视频，画面显示一条眼镜蛇竟然在正在行驶的汽车内部突然窜出。该博主借此提醒民众在泰国雨季或草木茂盛区域行车时，需定期检查车辆密封情况，尤其在停车后应留意是否有爬行动物钻入车底或引擎盖，以防此类危险事件发生。

title: Actor files complaint after AI porn clip posing as him is sold online
desc: Actor files complaint after AI porn clip posing as him is sold online Legacy A Thai film actor, along with a well-known director, filed a police complaint today, March 25.
desc_original: Actor files complaint after AI porn clip posing as him is sold online Legacy A Thai film actor, along with a well-known director, filed a police complaint today, March 25.
title_cn: 泰国男星遭AI换脸手段制作色情片贩卖，已报案追究责任
summary_cn: 3月25日，一名泰国知名电影男演员在一名著名导演的陪同下，正式向警方报案。起因是他发现有人利用 AI 换脸技术冒充其肖像制作色情短片，并在网络平台上公开销售。此案再次引发泰国社会对人工智能犯罪及个人名誉受侵害的广泛关注，警方正介入调查非法销售渠道。

title_cn: 女子指控穆达汉府（Mukdahan）僧侣始乱终弃并强迫打胎
summary_cn: 一名泰国女子近日公开指控穆达汉府（Mukdahan）的一名僧侣。该女子称与其保持地下恋情，但该僧侣不仅对感情不忠，还在其怀孕后施压要求其堕胎。此类丑闻再次引发泰国社会对僧侣行为规范及佛教界形象的广泛关注。目前相关部门正介入调查该僧侣违背戒律的行为。
desc_original: Thai woman accuses Mukdahan monk of abortion pressure Legacy A Thai woman accused a monk in Mukdahan province, with whom she has a relationship , of being unfaithful and pressuring her to have an abortion .

title_cn: 一缅甸女子因涉嫌非法招募劳工在龙仔厝府（Samut Sakhon）被捕
summary_cn: 3月25日，泰国警方根据法院逮捕令，在龙仔厝府（Samut Sakhon）成功逮捕了一名缅甸籍女性嫌疑人。该女子被控非法招募外籍劳工，涉及非法跨国劳务中介活动。泰国当局近期加大了对非法外劳及其招募链条的打击力度，以维护劳动力市场秩序。
desc_original: Myanmar woman arrested over alleged illegal migrant recruitment Legacy A Myanmar woman wanted under a court warrant was arrested in Samut Sakhon today, March 25.

title_cn: 泰移民局廊开府（Nong Khai）拘捕老挝嫌犯 涉曼谷碎尸杀女友案
summary_cn: 3月24日下午，泰国移民局在廊开府（Nong Khai）边境拦截了一名24岁的老挝籍男子Tom。该嫌疑人涉嫌在曼谷杀害并肢解其女友，企图潜逃出境。此次抓捕系接到曼谷警方的协调请求后展开的跨府联动。目前案件正在进一步审理并调查作案动机。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 泰国移民局廊开府办公室通报称，3月24日17时左右，廊开府移民局接到协调请求，要求协助拦截一名24岁的老挝籍嫌疑人Tom。该嫌疑人涉嫌在曼谷杀害并肢解女友。

title_cn: 尚泰零售集团（Central Pattana）未来5年拟投1100亿铢布局核心城市
summary_cn: 泰国零售巨头尚泰商业发展公共有限公司（Central Pattana）宣布宏伟扩张计划，拟在未来5年内投入超过1100亿泰铢。投资重点将聚焦于主要城市及旅游城市的综合体开发和房地产项目。这反映了泰国核心零售商对长期经济及旅游业复苏的信心，将进一步带动相关地段价值。
desc_original: 泰国最大购物中心开发商尚泰商业发展公共有限公司表示，计划在未来5年投资超过1100亿泰铢以扩展其项目组合，扩建综合体及房地产项目。

title_cn: 警方突袭芭提雅别墅：逮捕25名涉赌印度籍人员 流水超7亿铢
summary_cn: 泰国警方在芭提雅（Pattaya）查封了一处被改造成网络赌博基地的别墅，现场逮捕了25名印度籍人员。据悉，该基地运营着三个博彩网站，涉案资金往来流水高达7亿泰铢。这反映了外籍团伙利用租用别墅从事地下产业的现象频发，警方已加强对旅游城市高端别墅区的排查。
desc_original: 25 Indians arrested for turning Pattaya villa into online gambling base Legacy Police arrested 25 Indian nationals after conducting a raid on a villa in Pattaya that was converted into an operational base for three online gambling websites, with more than 700 million baht circulated through the platforms.

title: 泰国建筑业数字化转型：借力ERP系统提升透明度与规模化
desc: How Thailand’s construction industry is turning to ERP systems for control, transparency, and scale Legacy Thailand’s construction industry is entering a decisive phase of transformation.
desc_original: How Thailand’s construction industry is turning to ERP systems for control, transparency, and scale Legacy Thailand’s construction industry is entering a decisive phase of transformation.
summary_cn: 泰国建筑业正进入转型的关键阶段，越来越多的企业开始采用ERP（企业资源计划）系统。通过数字化手段，行业旨在解决传统管理中的成本超支和低效率问题，实现项目进度的精准控制及供应链透明化。这标志着泰国传统基建领域向现代化管理迈进，有利于大型项目在规模化扩张中保持竞争力。
title_cn: 泰国建筑业数字化转型：借力ERP系统提升透明度与规模化

title: 暖武里府（Nonthaburi）母亲质疑法律：儿子遭恶犬咬伤无人问责
desc: A mother in Pak Kret district, Nonthaburi, is asking agencies to intervene and questioning the law after her 12 year old son was bitten by a dog near their housing complex.
desc_original: A mother in Pak Kret district, Nonthaburi, is asking agencies to intervene and questioning the law after her 12 year old son was bitten by a dog near their housing complex.
summary_cn: 在暖武里府 Nonthaburi 的北革县 Pak Kret，一名母亲公开呼吁政府机构介入。其12岁的儿子在住宅区附近被恶犬咬伤，但处理过程中面临责任认定难的问题，导致伤者家属求告无门。此事引发了对泰国动物管理法律及社区安全监管漏洞的质疑，反映出当地基础社区治理中的法律程序僵局。
title_cn: 暖武里府（Nonthaburi）母亲质疑法律：儿子遭恶犬咬伤无人问责

title: 泰国副总理阿努廷（Anutin）乘坐比亚迪 BYD 电动车赴总理府办公
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月25日，据泰媒报道，泰国总理阿努廷当天前往总理府执行公务时，乘坐其新近购入的比亚迪（BYD）纯电动车出行。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月25日，据泰媒报道，泰国总理阿努廷当天前往总理府执行公务时，乘坐其新近购入的比亚迪（BYD）纯电动车出行。
summary_cn: 3月25日，泰国副总理（原意表述校对，多处译为总理，实为副总理兼内政部长）阿努廷乘坐其新购入的比亚迪 BYD 纯电动汽车前往总理府办公。此举引发媒体关注，象征着泰国高层对中国电动汽车品牌的认可，同时也响应了泰国政府推行的绿色能源路线图。这反映出中泰在新能源汽车领域的紧密经贸合作。
title_cn: 泰国副总理阿努廷（Anutin）乘坐比亚迪 BYD 电动车赴总理府办公

title: 合艾（Hat Yai）发生逃单案：皮卡车主加满100升柴油后潜逃
desc: A pickup truck driver and a companion stole 100 litres of diesel worth 3,081 baht from a PTT petrol station in Hat Yai district, Songkhla province.
desc_original: A pickup truck driver and a companion stole 100 litres of diesel worth 3,081 baht from a PTT petrol station in Hat Yai district, Songkhla province.
summary_cn: 在宋卡府 Songkhla 的合艾县 Hat Yai，一名皮卡车驾驶员及其同伴在一家 PTT 加油站加注了100升柴油（价值约3,081泰铢）后未付款便驱车逃离。由于油价波动及经济压力，此类“霸王油”案件在泰南地区近期偶有发生。目前警方正通过加油站监控录像追踪嫌疑车辆。
title_cn: 合艾（Hat Yai）发生逃单案：皮卡车主加满100升柴油后潜逃

title: 苏梅岛（Koh Samui）惨烈事故：捷克网红及综合格斗拳手车祸身亡
desc: A Czech influencer and MMA fighter died on March 17 after her scooter was hit by a lorry on Koh Samui, Surat Thani.
desc_original: A Czech influencer and MMA fighter died on March 17 after her scooter was hit by a lorry on Koh Samui, Surat Thani.
summary_cn: 3月17日，在素叻他尼府的苏梅岛 Koh Samui 发生一起严重交通事故。一名捷克籍社交媒体网红兼综合格斗（MMA）拳手在驾驶轻便摩托车时，不慎被一辆大货车撞击，因伤势过重不幸去世。该事故再次引发公众对苏梅岛旅游区山路和工程车辆交通安全隐患的担忧，也是今年针对外籍游客的重大交通事故之一。
title_cn: 苏梅岛（Koh Samui）惨烈事故：捷克网红及综合格斗拳手车祸身亡

title: 曼谷曼桥花市 Pak Khlong Talat 引领 Z 世代“抱莲花拍照”穿搭新趋势
desc: 据泰媒报道，3月24日，曼谷Phra Nakhon地区的老牌花市Pak Khlong花市呈现出全新的热闹景象，Z世代年轻人纷纷前来选购鲜花。
desc_original: 据泰媒报道，3月24日，曼谷Phra Nakhon地区的老牌花市Pak Khlong花市呈现出全新的热闹景象，Z世代年轻人纷纷前来选购鲜花。
title_cn: 曼谷曼桥花市 Pak Khlong Talat 引领 Z 世代“抱莲花拍照”穿搭新趋势
summary_cn: 曼谷拍那空区 Phra Nakhon 的老牌曼桥花市 Pak Khlong Talat 近日焕发活力，成为泰国 Z 世代年轻人的热门打卡地。受社交媒体 OOTD（今日穿搭）风潮影响，年轻人纷纷前往采购鲜花，尤其是“抱着莲花拍照”成为最新复古文化流行趋势。这不仅带动了当地花卉市场的经济增长，也让传统花卉文化在年轻群体中得到重新诠释。

title: 泰国 2 月汽车产量同比增长 3.43% 但国内销量持续下滑
desc: 就2月单月的数据来看，泰国汽车产量同比增长3.43%、出口同比微降0.05%、内销同比减少2.17%。
desc_original: 就2月单月的数据来看，泰国汽车产量同比增长3.43%、出口同比微降0.05%、内销同比减少2.17%。
title_cn: 泰国 2 月汽车产量同比增长 3.43% 但国内销量持续下滑
summary_cn: 泰国 2026 年 2 月汽车工业数据显示，该月汽车总产量呈现积极增长，同比上升 3.43%。然而，市场出口量微降 0.05%，而受到国内贷款审批严格及经济波动干扰，国内销量（内销）同比减少 2.17%。这一数据反映出泰国虽维持着“亚洲底特律”的制造水平，但内需市场的复苏仍面临一定压力。

title: 阿努廷 Anutin 披露新内阁名单进入资格审查阶段 预计下周落地
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月24日16点40分，泰国总理兼内政部部长、泰自豪党党魁阿努廷在参加党内会议后透露，他已叮嘱所有议员重视国会的工作。在3月25日的国会会议上，泰自豪党将针对能源议题提出动议，他本人则没有需要特别说明的事项，但新政府愿意听取各方议员的建议、意见和批评，只要是能让事情往更好方向发展的，都应该认真听取。 当被问到是否有需要紧急推动的法律时，阿努廷回答说，有多部在上届积压的法律需要重新整理或修改后再次提出。 关于新内阁的组建时间表，阿努廷表示，目前各部长人选的名单已经送去资格审查，以确认是否符合宪法规定，或是否有任何人选与宪法相抵触。根据他从内阁秘书处了解到的信息，名单已送交18个独立机构审查，因为每个机构都是独立运作的，所以无法规定必须在几天内答复。人选资格审查完成后会送回内阁秘书处，再转交国务委员会秘书处，预计大约需要一周的时间。不过，阿努廷不愿告知新部长人选的总人数是否为35人，他只说，他已经把名单提交了。 至于国务委员会秘书长帕空将出任副总理这一传闻，阿努廷没有正面回答，而是反问说，有谁看到部长人选名单了吗，通常在国王御准之前，部长的任命事宜都不宜提前公开，所以这个问题他无法回答。 另外，阿努廷说，如果有人选的资格出现问题，就会更换成其他人，但流程也会拉长，因为内阁秘书处已告知，在这种情况下可能需要额外增加5天时间。泰自豪党的备用名单已自行做好安排，其他政党的事

title_cn: 阿努廷 Anutin 披露新内阁名单进入资格审查阶段 预计下周落地
summary_cn: 泰国副总理兼内政部长阿努廷 Anutin 表示，新一届内阁部长人选名单已送交 18 个独立机构进行资格审查。本次审查程序严密，旨在确保所有人选均符合宪法规定，预计整个审查及法律流程将耗时约一周。阿努廷强调，若有人选资格不符，政党已准备好备用人选方案，但任命最终需等待国王御准。此外，泰自豪党 Bhumjaithai 近期将在国会针对能源议题提出重要动议。

title: Commission opts to tighten data centre supervision
desc: The National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC) is tightening its regulatory grip on the booming data centre sector through a proposed shift in the licensing regime that will bring operators under closer state scrutiny.
desc_original: The National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC) is tightening its regulatory grip on the booming data centre sector through a proposed shift in the licensing regime that will bring operators under closer state scrutiny.
title_cn: 泰国国家广播电视和通信委员会 NBTC 将加强对数据中心的监管
summary_cn: 鉴于数据中心行业的蓬勃发展，泰国国家广播电视和通信委员会（NBTC）提议调整许可制度，以加强对该领域的监管力度。此举旨在通过将运营商纳入更严格的国家审查体系，确保数字基础设施的安全与合规，反映了泰国政府对关键科技基础设施监管权力的收紧。

title: SME loan demand deteriorates in Q1
desc: Confidence among small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) fell sharply in the first quarter, driven by mounting concerns over rising costs linked to the energy crisis and a slowdown in lending, according to the latest survey by the SME Development Bank of Thailand (SME D Bank).
desc_original: Confidence among small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) fell sharply in the first quarter, driven by mounting concerns over rising costs linked to the energy crisis and a slowdown in lending, according to the latest survey by the SME Development Bank of Thailand (SME D Bank).
title_cn: 泰国一季度中小企业贷款需求恶化，信心大幅下滑
summary_cn: 根据泰国中小企业发展银行（SME D Bank）的最新调查，受能源危机引发的成本上涨以及银行放贷速度放缓等因素影响，泰国中小企业的市场信心在2026年第一季度急剧下降。许多企业在面临经营压力的同时，难以获得必要的融资支持，宏观经济环境的挑战正直接冲击泰国中小企业的生存空间。

title: Opposition seeks energy crisis debate
desc: Opposition parties agreed at their first informal whips' meeting on Tuesday to seek an urgent House debate on the country's energy crisis, with the People's Party (PP) warning it would expose alleged fuel hoarding during today's parliamentary session.
desc_original: Opposition parties agreed at their first informal whips' meeting on Tuesday to seek an urgent House debate on the country's energy crisis, with the People's Party (PP) warning it would expose alleged fuel hoarding during today's parliamentary session.
title_cn: 反对党寻求就能源危机举行议会辩论
summary_cn: 在周二举行的反对党非正式会议上，各反对党派达成一致，要求下议院就当前的能源危机展开紧急辩论。人民党（People's Party, PP）警告称，由于能源成本高涨及燃油基金财务压力，他们将在议会讨论中揭露涉嫌“非法囤积燃料”的内幕，呼吁政府增加能源分配透明度。这预示着国会将迎来新一轮政治博弈。

title: Haad Thip 转向使用可回收玻璃瓶生产线
desc: SET-listed Haad Thip Plc, the exclusive bottler and distributor for Coca-Cola in 14 southern provinces, plans to expand its glass-bottled products to mitigate risks from rising plastic pellet prices, driven by ongoing conflicts in the Middle East.
desc_original: SET-listed Haad Thip Plc, the exclusive bottler and distributor for Coca-Cola in 14 southern provinces, plans to expand its glass-bottled products to mitigate risks from rising plastic pellet prices, driven by ongoing conflicts in the Middle East.
title_cn: Haad Thip 转向使用可回收玻璃瓶以应对原料成本上涨
summary_cn: 在泰国证券交易所（SET）上市的 Haad Thip 公司是泰国南部14个府的哥口可乐（Coca-Cola）独家装瓶商和分销商。受中东冲突影响，塑料颗粒价格持续走高，为规避成本风险，该公司计划扩大玻璃瓶装产品的生产比例。此举不仅有助于锁定包装成本，也符合减少塑料使用的环保趋势，显示出泰南饮料巨头对国际供应链波动的动态调整。

title: AXA highlights local insurance protection gap
desc: Thailand needs to address the protection gap in the insurance industry to drive growth in the sector, which is critical for the country's economic development and the well-being of its people, says France-based insurer AXA.
desc_original: Thailand needs to address the protection gap in the insurance industry to drive growth in the sector, which is critical for the country's economic development and the well-being of its people, says France-based insurer AXA.
title_cn: 安盛（AXA）指出泰国保险保障缺口显著
summary_cn: 总部位于法国的保险巨头安盛（AXA）近日指出，泰国保险市场存在明显的保障缺口。为了推动行业增长以及促进国家经济发展和国民福祉，泰国需要尽快缩小这一缺口。报告认为，提高保险渗透率对于应对老龄化社会及不可预见的经济风险至关重要。对于在泰投资者和居民而言，这预示着未来保险产品及金融监管环境可能迎来改革。

title: 泰国2月出口额达294亿美元 工业需求推动增长
desc_original: Exports surged by 9.9% year-on-year to US$29.4 billion in February, driven by strong industrial goods shipments, while imports jumped by 31.8% to $32.3 billion, mainly due to machinery and gold purchases, according to the Trade Policy and Strategy Office (TPSO).
summary_cn: 泰国贸易政策与战略办公室 (TPSO) 报告显示，2026年2月泰国出口额同比增长9.9%，达到294亿美元，主要动力来自强劲的工业产品出货量。与此同时，由于机械设备和黄金进口的激增，进口额录得31.8%的涨幅，达323亿美元。尽管整体出口向好，但进口的异常增长导致本月出现贸易逆差，反映出泰国工业生产扩产需求及避险资产配置的活跃，是观察泰国经济活力的重要宏观指标。
title_cn: 泰国2月出口额达294亿美元 工业需求推动增长

title: 芭提雅步行街 Walking Street 发生骚乱 澳洲网友在酒吧内头部重伤
desc_original: Tourist police respond to an incident on Pattaya’s Walking Street after an Australian man was found with multiple head injuries following a disturbance inside a pub. PATTAYA, Thailand – An Australian tourist was left with multiple head injuries after a late-night incident inside a pub on Pattaya’s Walking Street, prompting police to investigate the circumstances surrounding the case. Tourist police stationed along Walking Street received a report around 11:00 p.m. on March 23 that a foreign visitor had been injured inside an entertainment venue in South Pattaya area. Officers rushed to the sce
summary_cn: 3月23日晚约11时，芭提雅著名的步行街 (Walking Street) 一家酒吧内发生一起严重骚乱。一名澳大利亚籍游客被发现头部多处受伤，伤情严重。芭提雅旅游警察赶到现场后发现该男子血流不止。据初步调查，伤情是在酒吧内部发生冲突后造成的。警方目前正在调阅监控并询问目击者以还原真相。此事件引发了游客对夜间娱乐场所安保措施的关注。
title_cn: 芭提雅步行街 Walking Street 发生骚乱 澳洲网友在酒吧内头部重伤

title: 泰国参议院就成立“制宪议会”计划出现分歧
desc_original: The Senate has found itself divided over a proposal to establish a 200-member Constitution Drafting Assembly (CDA) to draft a new charter, with senators expressing both support and opposition during the latest parliamentary session.
summary_cn: 泰国参议院在近期议会会议上，就成立由200名成员组成的制宪议会 (CDA) 以起草新宪法的提议产生了严重分歧。支持派认为这是推动政治民主化的必要步骤，而反对派则对委员会的产生方式及权力范围表示担忧。宪法修正案作为泰国政治博弈的焦点，此次参议院的意见撕裂预示着修宪进程仍面临诸多法律和政治门槛。
title_cn: 泰国参议院就成立“制宪议会”计划出现分歧

title: L.P.N. 计划斥资 20 亿铢在曼谷（Bangkok）购地开发公寓
desc_original: SET-listed L.P.N. Development plans to spend 1-2 billion baht on new land acquisitions for condo development after freezing purchases for more than two years to clear inventory and refocus on the upper-affordable segment.
title_cn: L.P.N. 计划斥资 20 亿铢在曼谷（Bangkok）购地开发公寓
summary_cn: 泰国上市房企 L.P.N. Development 宣布计划投入 10 至 20 亿泰铢用于购买新土地，以开发曼谷公寓项目。此前由于需消化库存并重新定位针对“中高消费实力”群体，该公司已暂停购地超过两年。此举标志着 L.P.N. 在曼谷房地产市场特别是公寓领域重新回归扩张模式。

title: 老龄化社会背景下泰社会保障基金（SSF）改革迫在眉睫
desc_original: People's Party (PP) MP Nattacha Boonchaiinsawat has called for reforms to the Social Security Fund (SSF) to make it more transparent and sustainable, and to allow members to have a say in how the fund is managed.
title_cn: 老龄化社会背景下泰社会保障基金（SSF）改革迫在眉睫
summary_cn: 泰国民众党（People's Party）议员 Nattacha Boonchaiinsawat 呼吁 urgently 改革社会保障基金（Social Security Fund，SSF）。随着泰国加速进入老龄化社会，议员认为该基金需提高透明度与可持续性，并建议赋予基金成员在管理决策上的参与权。此项改革对在大马或泰国本地工作的社保缴纳者具有重要意义。

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）官员突击检查非法电子烟，在农普（Nong Prue）车库缴获数百件商品
desc_original: Pattaya officials inspect hundreds of illegal electronic cigarettes found in the trunk of a car during a raid on a vape sales operation in Nong Prue.
title_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）官员突击检查非法电子烟，在农普（Nong Prue）车库缴获数百件商品
summary_cn: 芭提雅有关部门在农普（Nong Prue）地区展开突击行动，打击非法电子烟销售。行动中，执法人员在一辆汽车后备箱内查获数百支非法电子烟。期间业主甚至与执法者发生对峙。泰国对电子烟法规范极其严格，持有人及销售者均面临高额罚款或监禁，提醒在泰人士切勿以身试法。

title: 外国游客芭提雅（Pattaya）街头斗殴上演惊人戏码：握手言和后各自离去
title_cn: 外国游客芭提雅（Pattaya）街头斗殴上演惊人戏码：握手言和后各自离去
desc_original: Two foreign tourists exchange blows in Soi 16 on Pattaya Second Road before the fight abruptly ends with a handshake.
summary_cn: 在芭提雅二路（Pattaya Second Road）的16巷（Soi 16），两名外国游客在街头发生肢体冲突，相互挥拳殴打，引发路人围观。然而，正当矛盾激化时，打斗却突然停止，双方在众目睽睽之下握手言和并平静走开。这起反转剧式的冲突并未造成严重后果，但也反映了旅游区夜间治安的波动性。

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）持续晴朗、海况平稳，酷热天气仍将延续
title_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）持续晴朗、海况平稳，酷热天气仍将延续
desc_original: Speed boats glide across Pattaya Bay under clear skies, with calm seas and mild waves offering ideal conditions for boating.
summary_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）迎来持续晴朗天气，芭提雅湾海面平静，波浪轻微，为快艇和水上活动提供了极佳条件。尽管气温持续偏高，炎热天气不断，但良好的海况吸引了大量游客出海。此类天气利好水上旅游业，但游客需注意防暑降温及紫外线防护。

title: 暗箭伤人：芭提雅（Pattaya）男子邀请陌生人共饮竟被割伤颈部
title_cn: 暗箭伤人：芭提雅（Pattaya）男子邀请陌生人共饮竟被割伤颈部
desc_original: A late-night drinking session turned violent when a man was wounded in the neck during an altercation with a stranger in Pattaya.
summary_cn: 在芭提雅（Pattaya）发生一起深夜流血事件。一名男子在与人饮酒时，一名陌生人临时加入。席间双方发生争执，该陌生人突然发动袭击，导致该男子颈部严重受伤。目前警方正在调查凶手身份。此案提醒在泰游客及居民，深夜社交需警惕陌生人，避免因过度饮酒引发冲突。

title: 泰国油轮安全通过霍尔木兹海峡
title_cn: 泰国油轮在外交斡旋后安全通过霍尔木兹海峡（Hormuz）
summary_cn: 泰国代理外交部长西哈萨克（Sihasak Phuangketkeow）于周二证实，一艘泰国籍油轮在与伊朗（Iran）及阿曼（Oman）进行成功外交磋商后，已安全驶过局势紧张的霍尔木兹海峡。此举显示了泰国在处理国际航运风险方面的协调能力，确保了能源物资运输通道的通畅。目前海峡局势虽仍敏感，但泰国籍船只已获准通行。
desc: A Thai ship has passed safely through the Strait of Hormuz following successful negotiations with Iran and Oman, Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow said on Tuesday.
desc_original: A Thai ship has passed safely through the Strait of Hormuz following successful negotiations with Iran and Oman, Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow said on Tuesday.

title: 泰国金矿污染案宣判：数百居民获赔
title_cn: 泰国披集府（Phichit）Chatree金矿污染案宣判，382名居民获赔及河流修复
summary_cn: 泰国法院针对披集府（Phichit）和碧差汶府（Phetchabun）382名居民提起的环境污染诉讼作出裁决。Chatree金矿运营商因长期作业导致有害物质污染及健康损害，被勒令向每位原告支付最高20万泰铢的赔偿金。此外，运营商还须负责修复受污染的受损水道，本案被视为泰国环保维权的重大进展。
desc: The Civil Court has ruled in favour of 382 residents of Phichit and Phetchabun provinces, ordering the operator of the Chatree gold mine operator to pay compensation of up to 200,000 baht per person, and to restore contaminated waterways after finding its operations caused harmful pollution and health impacts.
desc_original: The Civil Court has ruled in favour of 382 residents of Phichit and Phetchabun provinces, ordering the operator of the Chatree gold mine operator to pay compensation of up to 200,000 baht per person, and to restore contaminated waterways after finding its operations caused harmful pollution and health impacts.

title: 陆军情报处警告柬埔寨正囤积武器
title_cn: 泰国陆军情报主管警告边境争端或重燃，柬埔寨正大量订购武器
summary_cn: 泰国陆军情报处负责人发布安全预警，警告泰柬边境冲突可能再度升级。情报显示柬埔寨政府目前正在大量采购武器装备。基于历史性的边境土地争议背景，此举引起泰方高度关注。军方正密切监控动向，以防边境局势出现变数，这也让两国近年趋于平缓的关系再次面临考验。
desc: The Thai army intelligence chief has warned that the border conflict with Cambodia could reignite, pointing out that Phnom Penh has placed large orders for weaponary.
desc_original: The Thai army intelligence chief has warned that the border conflict with Cambodia could reignite, pointing out that Phnom Penh has placed large orders for weaponary.

title: 为泰党目标在2030年席位翻倍
title_cn: 为泰党（Pheu Thai）领袖朱拉潘（Julapun）设定2030年大选150议席目标
summary_cn: 为泰党领袖朱拉潘（Julapun Amornvivat）在党内会议中不仅要求全体议员保持团结，更明确提出了要在下次大选中夺回150个直选议席的宏伟目标。同时，对于外界有关党内派系争夺内阁席位的传闻，朱拉潘予以驳斥。在当前竞争激烈的泰国政坛，此番言论旨在稳固军心，并为未来的选举周期铺路。
desc: Pheu Thai Party leader Julapun Amornvivat has called on party MPs to remain united and set their sights on returning 150 members to the House in the next election, while dismissing speculation that members were jockeying for cabinet seats.
desc_original: Pheu Thai Party leader Julapun Amornvivat has called on party MPs to remain united and set their sights on returning 150 members to the House in the next election, while dismissing speculation that members were jockeying for cabinet seats.

title: 澜湄合作十周年：砥砺前行，共筑美好未来
title_cn: 澜湄合作十周年：王毅外长阐述六国砥砺前行，共筑美好未来
desc: This article was written by Wang Yi , Foreign Minister of the People's Republic of China. The Lancang-Mekong nourishes our six nations and binds us closely together.
desc_original: This article was written by Wang Yi , Foreign Minister of the People's Republic of China. The Lancang-Mekong nourishes our six nations and binds us closely together.
summary_cn: 中国外交部长王毅撰文纪念澜沧江-湄公河（Lancang-Mekong）合作启动十周年。文章指出，澜湄河水源远流长，滋养着流域六国（中泰马老缅越），将各国命运紧密联系在一起。十年间，澜湄合作已成为区域合作的典范。双方在水资源管理、互联互通及经济一体化方面取得显著进展，共同构建了命运共同体，为东南亚长久繁荣奠定基础。

title: Two Thai students killed in Miami hit-and-run crash
title_cn: 两名泰国留学生在迈阿密（Miami）遭遇肇事逃逸车祸身亡
desc: MIAMI, US — Two Thai nationals were killed in a hit-and-run crash in Miami Beach during a spring break trip, authorities in the United States said.
desc_original: MIAMI, US — Two Thai nationals were killed in a hit-and-run crash in Miami Beach during a spring break trip, authorities in the United States said.
summary_cn: 两名泰国籍留学生在美国佛罗里达州迈阿密海滩（Miami Beach）不幸遭遇交通意外身亡。据悉，两人当时正在进行春假旅行，一辆汽车撞击二人后肇事逃逸。美国当地警方已证实死者身份均为泰国公民。目前相关部门正在全力追捕嫌疑人，泰国驻美使馆已接获通知处理善后事宜，此事引发泰国社交媒体对留学生安全的关注。

title: 中泰携手打造澜湄合作（LMC）2.0，将区域合作提升至新高度
desc: This article was written by Zhang Jianwei , Chinese Ambassador to Thailand. The Lancang-Mekong River binds the peoples of the six Lancang-Mekong countries closely together.
desc_original: This article was written by Zhang Jianwei , Chinese Ambassador to Thailand. The Lancang-Mekong River binds the peoples of the six Lancang-Mekong countries closely together.
summary_cn: 中国驻泰国大使韩志强（Zhang Jianwei，注：原文化名为张建卫）撰文指出，澜沧江-湄公河（Lancang-Mekong River）将澜湄六国人民紧密联系在一起。当前澜湄合作正步入“2.0时代”，中国与泰国作为互为近邻和全面战略合作伙伴，将深化经贸、互联互通及人文交流，通过流域内多边协作应对风险，共同构建更高水平的区域合作共同体。
title_cn: 中泰携手打造澜湄合作（LMC）2.0，将区域合作提升至新高度

title: 曼谷 HYROX 2026 运动赛事爆意外：泰国运动员突发中暑紧急送医
desc: Thai athlete treated for heatstroke during HYROX Bangkok 2026 Legacy A Thai female athlete required emergency medical treatment during HYROX Bangkok 2026 in Bangkok...
desc_original: Thai athlete treated for heatstroke during HYROX Bangkok 2026 Legacy A Thai female athlete required emergency medical treatment during HYROX Bangkok 2026 in Bangkok...
summary_cn: 在曼谷（Bangkok）举行的 HYROX 2026 全球健身竞赛期间，一名泰国女运动员因高强度竞技与高温天气引发严重中暑，现场医疗团队紧急介入急救。随着近期泰国气温回升，运动性热射病风险加剧，此次事件再次引发公众对大型户外及室内体育赛事医疗应急准备的关注。目前运动员已送往医院接受进一步治疗。
title_cn: 曼谷 HYROX 2026 运动赛事爆意外：泰国运动员突发中暑紧急送医

title: 泰国医美巨头SLC集团成立中国事业部，携手泰国亚洲大众集团服务中泰客户
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 2026年3月24日上午9时09分，泰国顶尖医美品牌SLC集团 (Aesthetic Answer Co., Ltd.) 与泰国亚洲大众集团（简称JRN）在曼谷隆重举行了战略合作签约仪式。...
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 2026年3月24日上午9时09分，泰国顶尖医美品牌SLC集团 (Aesthetic Answer Co., Ltd.) 与泰国亚洲大众集团（简称JRN）在曼谷隆重举行了战略合作签约仪式。...
summary_cn: 2026年3月24日，泰国知名医美连锁品牌 SLC 集团与泰国亚洲大众集团（JRN）在曼谷达成战略合作。SLC 特别宣布成立中国事业部，旨在针对日益增长的在泰华人及赴泰中国游客群体提供精准的医美服务。双方将整合泰国顶级医疗资源与华文媒体品牌优势，提升中国客户的医疗咨询与服务体验，推动泰国医美服务国际化。
title_cn: 泰国医美巨头SLC集团成立中国事业部，携手泰国亚洲大众集团服务中泰客户
泰星 Milli 跻身 Spotify EQUAL 全球顶级大使，海外播放量暴涨 1794%
summary_cn: 3月23日，泰国著名女说唱歌手 Milli 被官宣入选 Spotify 全球“EQUAL”计划顶级大使。作为代表泰国走向国际的音乐人，其单曲在海外市场的播放量录得 1794% 的惊人增长，展现了泰国流行文化（T-Pop）强劲的输出能力。此次入选旨在支持女性音乐人的平等地位，巩固了其作为泰国软实力代表的国际影响力。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，3月23日，泰国实力女歌手Milli 被宣布入选Spotify旗下“EQUAL”计划的全球顶级大使之一。...

title_cn: 曼谷（Bangkok）面部拉皮手术指南：何时才是最佳干预时机？
summary_cn: 本文探讨了在曼谷（Bangkok）进行的面部提升和紧致美容方案。涵盖了从非手术类、微创类到传统外科手术的选择。专家建议理解不同疗程的术后效果差异，对于追求抗衰老的曼谷中产阶级及外籍人士，需综合考虑年龄、皮肤组织垂感及恢复期成本，本文为寻求医美服务的群体提供了科学的决策依据。
desc_original: Facial Lifting and Tightening in Bangkok: Understanding Non-Surgical, Minimally Invasive, and Surgical Options

title: 泰国邮政（Thailand Post）携手知识产权厅（DIP）力推地理标志产品 GI Product 市场
desc_original: 泰国邮政携手知识产权厅，通过邮政网络和ThailandPostMart共同推动泰国GI地理标志产品迈向全链条市场...
title_cn: 泰国邮政（Thailand Post）携手知识产权厅力推 GI 特色地理标志产品全链条市场
summary_cn: 泰国邮政公司与泰国知识产权厅（DIP）达成合作，通过邮政旗下的分发网络和 ThailandPostMart 在线平台，共同推动泰国地理标志产品（GI Product）的市场化。此举旨在帮助地方优质产品拓展销售渠道，构建从生产到物流的完整产业链，提升地方经济活力，助力泰国本土特色产品走向全国乃至全球市场。

title: French man reports assault, 30,000 baht bill at Chiang Mai karaoke
desc_original: French man reports assault, 30,000 baht bill at Chiang Mai karaoke Legacy Police in Mueang Chiang Mai are investigating a complaint filed yesterday, March 23, after a Frenchman reported an assault and a 30,000 baht drinks bill at a karaoke venue in Chiang Mai. The tourist gave a statement identifying himself as 35 year old Kevin, a French national who has been living in Chon Buri province for around two years. According to him, the bill included eight small bottles of beer and service fees, totalling 30,000 baht. Kevin told investigators the argument over the bill escalated into pushing and pu
title_cn: 法国男子报案，称在清迈（Chiang Mai）卡拉OK遭殴打并被收3万铢账单
summary_cn: 一名35岁的法国籍男子报案称，他在清迈府治县（Mueang Chiang Mai）的一家卡拉OK厅消费时，仅饮用8瓶小啤酒却被收取含服务费在内共3万泰铢的巨额账单。该男子（已在春武里府生活两年）在对账单表示不满时，疑与店方发生冲突并遭到殴打。清迈警方目前正对此类针对游客的消费陷阱及人身伤害行为展开调查。
location_detail: 清迈府治县 Mueang Chiang Mai

title: 美国人滞留泰国素万那普机场8天？假的！
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月23日，近日网络流传的一段视频引发了不少关注，一名外国人称他已经在泰国素万那普机场住了8天多...
title_cn: 谣言澄清：网传美国人滞留素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi）8天为虚假信息
summary_cn: 近日社交媒体流传一段视频，称一名外籍人士不仅在曼谷素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi Airport）被迫滞留超过8天，引发舆论对移民局管理的质疑。经调查查证，该视频内容与事实不符。机场管理部门及相关人员澄清称该传闻属于虚假陈述。泰国官方提醒民众切勿轻信及转发此类可能损害国家旅游形象的未证实视频。
location_detail: 素万那普机场 Suvarnabhumi Airport

title: 油价飙升威胁泰国 GDP 增长并推高通胀
desc_original: A rise in global oil prices poses a growing risk to Thailand's economic outlook, with Tisco Financial Group warning that a 10% increase in crude from a baseline of US$72 per barrel could trim GDP growth by 0.3-0.4 percentage points, while lifting inflation by about 0.8%.
summary_cn: 全球油价上涨对泰国经济前景构成风险。泰isko金融集团（Tisco Financial Group）警告称，若原油价格在每桶72美元的基准上上涨10%，可能会使泰国国内生产总值（GDP）增长率降低0.3至0.4个百分点，同时推高通胀率约0.8%。这反映出能源成本波动对泰国进口依赖型经济的深远影响。
title_cn: 油价飙升威胁泰国 GDP 增长并推高通胀

title: 泰国国家审计署（SAO）确认不在崩塌原址重建总部
desc: The State Audit Office (SAO) has confirmed it has no plans to rebuild on the site of its headquarters in Bangkok, which collapsed on March 28 last year while under construction.
desc_original: The State Audit Office (SAO) has confirmed it has no plans to rebuild on the site of its headquarters in Bangkok, which collapsed on March 28 last year while under construction.
title_cn: 泰国国家审计署（SAO）确认不在崩塌原址重建总部
summary_cn: 泰国国家审计署（SAO）正式确认，没有计划在曼谷（Bangkok）原总部大楼遗址上进行重建。该工地曾在去年3月28日施工期间发生严重的坍塌事故。此决定意味着该核心地块的未来用途将重新规划，同时也反映了当局对该地块建筑安全性的审慎态度，相关后续选址工作备受关注。

title: 民主党推出物价追踪工具 应对燃料短缺与通胀
desc: The Democrat Party has urged the government to explain persistent fuel shortages and launched a digital platform to crowdsource reports of unusual price hikes.
desc_original: The Democrat Party has urged the government to explain persistent fuel shortages and launched a digital platform to crowdsource reports of unusual price hikes.
title_cn: 民主党推出物价追踪工具 应对燃料短缺与通胀
summary_cn: 泰国民主党（Democrat Party）近日敦促政府就持续存在的燃料短缺问题给出解释，并正式上线了一个社交数字平台。该平台允许民众通过众包方式实时举报异常涨价行为。在生活成本攀升的背景下，此举旨在利用民间力量监督市场动向，向政府施压以解决民生通胀问题。

title: 泰国国会议员福利面临严格审查
desc: Surging living costs have intensified scrutiny of parliamentary spending, with proposals by Dr Warong Dechgitvigrom triggering widespread reactions across political and public spheres.
desc_original: Surging living costs have intensified scrutiny of parliamentary spending, with proposals by Dr Warong Dechgitvigrom triggering widespread reactions across political and public spheres.
title_cn: 泰国国会议员福利面临严格审查
summary_cn: 随着生活成本飙升，泰国公众对议会开支的监督力度空前加大。瓦龙医生（Dr Warong Dechgitvigrom）提出的关于缩减议员福利的提案在政界和民间引发了激烈辩论。在经济压力下，议员的高额津贴与福利是否合理成为舆论焦点，这反映了民众对政府官员与老百姓“同甘共苦”的期望。

title: 变废为宝：泰国团队研发鱼类废弃物提取钙片技术
desc: Researchers at Rajamangala University of Technology, Thanyaburi, have developed a method to extract calcium from by-products from the fish processing industry, turning what is essentially waste into a high-value product.
desc_original: Researchers at Rajamangala University of Technology, Thanyaburi, have developed a method to extract calcium from by-products from the fish processing industry, turning what is essentially waste into a high-value product.
title_cn: 变废为宝：泰国团队研发鱼类废弃物提取钙片技术
summary_cn: 拉贾曼加拉科技大学坦亚武里分校（RMUTT）的研究人员成功研发出一种创新方法，能从鱼类加工业的副产品中提取钙质，并制成补钙片。该技术将原本无用的废弃物转化为高价值健康产品，不仅有助于降低环境污染，也为泰国食品加工业的循环经济提供了新的商业范式。

title: 芭提雅 PTT 加油站油料告罄引民众投诉，官方调查后未发现囤积行为
desc_original: Banglamung officials visited the PTT service station in Huai Yai, south of Pattaya, on Monday to inspect fuel availability and ensure fair service after residents reported the station had temporarily run dry.
summary_cn: 周一，挽拉蒙县（Banglamung）官员前往位于芭提雅南部的淮雅（Huai Yai）PTT 加油站进行突击检查。此前有居民投诉该站燃油售罄，导致日常出行受阻。经官员核查，该加油站确实出现了暂时性断供，但并未发现违法囤积燃油的行为。此次检查旨在确保能源供应透明度，维护消费者公平服务的权利。
title_cn: 芭提雅 PTT 加油站油料告罄引民众投诉，官方调查后未发现囤积行为

title: 曼谷空气污染引发关注，加拿大护肤品牌 NIOD 推出“大城市面部护理”活动
desc_original: We are reminded of Bangkok's pollutants through Canadian beauty brand NIOD's newest campaign targeting "The New York Facial".
summary_cn: 加拿大护肤品牌 NIOD 在泰国推出的最新营销活动中，重点聚焦于曼谷（Bangkok）日益严峻的空气污染问题。该品牌借由对抗“大城市污染”的产品理念，呼吁曼谷居民关注环境污染物对皮肤造成的损害。虽然此类营销带有商业属性，但也再次引发了公众对曼谷长期居高不下的污染物水平的讨论。
title_cn: 曼谷空气污染引发关注，加拿大护肤品牌 NIOD 推出“大城市面部护理”活动

title: 芭提雅 Vicky Travel 旅行社：深耕59载助力复杂出行需求
desc: With more than 59 years of business experience, Marlowe Malhotra of Vicky Travel is known not only for his expertise in travel but also for his willingness to listen and guide customers through even the most complex travel needs. PATTAYA, Thailand – In a fast-moving travel landscape where plans can change in an instant, trusted local agents are stepping in to simplify the experience.
desc_original: With more than 59 years of business experience, Marlowe Malhotra of Vicky Travel is known not only for his expertise in travel but also for his willingness to listen and guide customers through even the most complex travel needs. PATTAYA, Thailand – In a fast-moving travel landscape where plans can change in an instant, trusted local agents are stepping in to simplify the experience.
summary_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）知名本土地理机构 Vicky Travel 的 Marlowe Malhotra 凭借超59年的行业经验，致力为客户解决复杂的旅行安排。在当前多变的国际旅游环境下，该旅行社强调通过专业的引导和细致的咨询服务，为曼谷及芭提雅周边的长期驻外及度假游客提供更安心的出行保障，体现了本土旅行代理在数字时代的人文价值。
title_cn: 芭提雅 Vicky Travel 旅行社：深耕59载助力复杂出行需求

title: 尽管成本上升，芭提雅（Pattaya）仍是国际避险人群的首选地
desc: Visitors fleeing conflict may consider Pattaya as a safe destination, where hotels and services are prepared to host international arrivals despite rising living costs.
desc_original: Visitors fleeing conflict may consider Pattaya as a safe destination, where hotels and services are prepared to host international arrivals despite rising living costs.
summary_cn: 尽管泰国生活成本逐年上升，但芭提雅（Pattaya）凭借其完善的酒店配套和多元化服务，依然被视为避开地缘冲突的理想安全目的地。许多国际访客因其成熟的生活后勤保障，选择在此长期居留或进行临时撤离安顿。芭提雅的服务业已做好充足准备，迎接那些寻求安全避风港的国际人士。
title_cn: 尽管成本上升，芭提雅（Pattaya）仍是国际避险人群的首选地

title: 通胀冲击物价，芭提雅（Pattaya）或将逐渐告别“廉价假期”时代
desc: Tourists visiting Pattaya will eventually feel the impact of inflation on flights, transport, food, and attractions, even as baht-buses continue to serve cost- and safety-conscious vacationers.
desc_original: Tourists visiting Pattaya will eventually feel the impact of inflation on flights, transport, food, and attractions, even as baht-buses continue to serve cost- and safety-conscious vacationers.
summary_cn: 随着通货膨胀波及航空、燃油、餐饮和各大旅游景点，芭提雅（Pattaya）昔日“廉价旅游天堂”的标签正面临挑战。游客将明显感受到各项旅行支出的上涨。尽管价格低廉且便捷的双条车（Baht-bus）仍在服务注重性价比的游客，但整体消费水平的提升已成为赴泰游客及当地居民不得不面对的经济现实。
title_cn: 通胀冲击物价，芭提雅（Pattaya）或将逐渐告别“廉价假期”时代

title: 中东冲突升级，泰国电信运营商称互联网服务不受影响
title_cn: 中东冲突（Middle East）虽有风险，电信商称泰国互联网服务不受影响
summary_cn: 面对中东（Middle East）冲突对海底电缆系统可能造成的风险，泰国主要电信运营商向客户承诺，由于拥有完善的网络冗余系统和多样化的路由路径，泰国境内互联网服务将保持稳定。该声明旨在缓解民众对国际局势动荡可能导致网络中断的担忧，目前泰国跨境数据传输路径具备高度弹性。
desc: Major telecommunications operators have reassured customers that their internet services in Thailand remain stable and unaffected, mainly due to their network redundancy systems and diversified routing paths, despite potential risks to undersea cable systems stemming from the conflict in the Middle East.
desc_original: Major telecommunications operators have reassured customers that their internet services in Thailand remain stable and unaffected, mainly due to their network redundancy systems and diversified routing paths, despite potential risks to undersea cable systems stemming from the conflict in the Middle East.

title: 泰国北部破获重大毒品案，缴获2100万粒疯药和320公斤冰毒
title_cn: 泰北（Northern Thailand）清迈（Chiang Mai）警方破获五起大案，缴获逾两千万粒麻古
summary_cn: 清迈（Chiang Mai）警方通报，在泰国北部地区近期破获的5起重大毒品案件中，共逮捕了10名犯罪嫌疑人。行动中缴获了2100万粒甲基苯丙胺（麻古/Speed pills）以及320公斤冰毒（Crystal meth）。这次大规模打击行动显示出边境地带毒品走私依然严峻，对当地治安构成重大威胁。
desc: CHIANG MAI - Authorities have seized 21 million methamphetamine pills, 320 kilogrammes of crystal meth and arrested 10 suspects in five major drug cases in northern Thailand.
desc_original: CHIANG MAI - Authorities have seized 21 million methamphetamine pills, 320 kilogrammes of crystal meth and arrested 10 suspects in five major drug cases in northern Thailand.

title: 泰国股市SET指数跌破1400点大关
title_cn: 地缘局势引发抛售潮，泰国SET指数周一失守1400点
summary_cn: 受日益紧张的地缘政治局势和全球避险情绪升温影响，周一泰国证券交易所（SET）基准指数大幅下滑，跌破了关键的1400点心理关口。市场出现大范围抛售，反映出投资者对宏观环境不确定性的担忧，泰金市场整体承压。
desc: Thailand’s benchmark index slipped below the key 1,400-point range on Monday as escalating geopolitical tensions and global risk-off sentiment triggered broad-based selling.
desc_original: Thailand’s benchmark index slipped below the key 1,400-point range on Monday as escalating geopolitical tensions and global risk-off sentiment triggered broad-based selling.

title: 老地方新菜单：曼谷多家餐厅酒吧焕新美食体验
desc: Bored of eating the same thing twice? Fear no more, here's a list of restaurants and bars that have shuffled things up to make sure you're never bored or short of choices while dining out.
desc_original: Bored of eating the same thing twice? Fear no more, here's a list of restaurants and bars that have shuffled things up to make sure you're never bored or short of choices while dining out.
summary_cn: 如果您已经厌倦了千篇一律的口味，曼谷多家知名餐厅和酒吧近期纷纷推陈出新。此番更新涵盖了从创意料理到特色调酒的多重选择，旨在为食客提供更多样化的进餐体验。无论是追求新鲜感的本地居民还是旅居泰国的游客，都能在这些“老地方”的新菜单中找到惊喜，是周末探店和社交聚会的理想选择。
title_cn: 老地方新菜单：曼谷多家餐厅酒吧焕新美食体验

title: 曼谷拉差帕颂（Ratchaprasong）商务区迎来全新屋顶酒吧 Sato San
desc: Sato San is the new rooftop bar, sitting atop Moxy Bangkok Ratchaprasong on the 32nd floor.
desc_original: Sato San is the new rooftop bar, sitting atop Moxy Bangkok Ratchaprasong on the 32nd floor.
summary_cn: 位于曼谷繁华商圈拉差帕颂（Ratchaprasong）的新地标屋顶酒吧 Sato San 正式亮相。该酒吧坐落于 Moxy Bangkok Ratchaprasong 酒店的32层，拥有迷人的城市景观视角。作为曼谷天际线上的社交新宠，其地理位置优越，邻近各大购物中心，为喜欢夜生活的泰国民众和游客提供了一个现代感十足的高空休闲去处。
title_cn: 曼谷拉差帕颂（Ratchaprasong）商务区迎来全新屋顶酒吧 Sato San

title: 泰国空间技术发展局（GISTDA）助力泰国参与 NASA “阿尔忒弥斯”登月与火星任务
desc: BANGKOK — Thailand is moving to stake a place in space exploration as the Geo-Informatics and Space Technology Development Agency (GISTDA) joined forces with 40 public and private organizations to push for involvement in NASA’s Artemis program.
desc_original: BANGKOK — Thailand is moving to stake a place in space exploration as the Geo-Informatics and Space Technology Development Agency (GISTDA) joined forces with 40 public and private organizations to push for involvement in NASA’s Artemis program.
summary_cn: 泰国地理信息与空间技术发展局（GISTDA）近日联合40家公共及私营机构，旨在推动泰国深入参与美国国家航空航天局（NASA）的“阿尔忒弥斯”（Artemis）登月及火星探测计划。此举标志着泰国在国际航天探索领域争取一席之地的雄心。通过此次跨部门合作，泰国希望在空间科技开发、学术研究和航天工业合作方面提升核心竞争力。
title_cn: 泰国空间技术发展局（GISTDA）助力泰国参与 NASA “阿尔忒弥斯”登月与火星任务

title: 春武里邦萨雷海滩（Bang Sare）七旬德国游客溺水获救，由于急救及时脱离危险
desc: CHONBURI — A 71-year-old German tourist was rescued after nearly drowning at Bang Sare beach on Monday afternoon. Rescue teams from Sawang Rojanatham Sattahip Foundation responded.
desc_original: CHONBURI — A 71-year-old German tourist was rescued after nearly drowning at Bang Sare beach on Monday afternoon. Rescue teams from Sawang Rojanatham Sattahip Foundation responded.
summary_cn: 本周一下午，一名71岁的德国游客在春武里府（Chonburi）的邦萨雷（Bang Sare）海滩游泳时发生溺水险情。来自梭挑邑罗惹纳探基金会（Sawang Rojanatham Sattahip Foundation）的救援团队迅速赶到现场并进行了心肺复苏（CPR）。目前该游客已获救。此事再次提醒在泰海滨度假的游客注意水上安全，尤其是在风浪多变的海域。
title_cn: 春武里邦萨雷海滩（Bang Sare）七旬德国游客溺水获救，由于急救及时脱离危险

title: 曼谷大型商场发生窃案：缅甸籍籍惯犯盗窃越南游客包袋被捕
desc: BANGKOK — Police have arrested a Myanmar national for allegedly stealing a Vietnamese tourist’s backpack at a shopping mall in central Bangkok.
desc_original: BANGKOK — Police have arrested a Myanmar national for allegedly stealing a Vietnamese tourist’s backpack at a shopping mall in central Bangkok.
summary_cn: 曼谷警方近日在市中心一家知名购物中心内逮捕了一名缅甸籍男子。据指控，该男子在该商场内窃取了一名越南游客的背包。商场监控协助警方迅速锁定了犯罪嫌疑人。此类针对外国游客的盗窃案在热门景区的商圈偶有发生，警方提醒广大游客在人流密集地点务必看管好随身财物并时刻保持警惕。
title_cn: 曼谷大型商场发生窃案：缅甸籍籍惯犯盗窃越南游客包袋被捕
2026泰国万国小姐大赛 Miss Grand Thailand 举办“各府特色服装”对决
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月22日晚，作为2026年泰国万国小姐大赛（Miss Grand Thailand 2026）的重要组成单元...
summary_cn: 3月22日晚，2026年泰国万国小姐（Miss Grand Thailand 2026）全国选拔赛进入精彩的“各府特色服装展示”环节。来自全泰77个府的佳丽身着巧妙融合当地文化、传说及缩微地标的创意华服亮相。这一单元不仅展示了泰国府级的文化多元性，也是选美赛事中最具社交媒体传播影响力的标志性环节。

title_cn: 跨越60载的寻找：外籍男子凭1966年旧照寻泰籍妻子与儿子
desc_original: Foreign man searches for Thai wife and son with letter and photos from 1966 Legacy A foreign man is searching for his Thai wife and their son...
summary_cn: 一名外国男子近日通过网络发起求助，希望能找到他失联超过半个世纪的泰籍妻子和儿子。他手中仅持有1966年的信件和泛黄的照片。这一动人的寻亲行动在泰国社交媒体引发广泛关注，反映了跨越几十年的家庭羁绊，网友正热衷于通过社交线索帮助这位老人寻找在泰国的亲人踪迹。

title_cn: 曼谷 Bangkok 三年级男童因未能通过阿拉伯语阅读考核被体罚17次
desc_original: BANGKOK — A mother has sought help after her nine-year-old son was allegedly beaten 17 times by a teacher at an Islamic religious school...
summary_cn: 在曼谷（Bangkok）发生一起引发公愤的校园体罚事件。一名9岁的三年级男童报称因未能通过伊斯兰教学校的阿拉伯语读写测试，被老师连续抽打体罚17次。该男童母亲已报案并寻求司法援助。此事件引发了泰国社会对宗教学校监管及禁止教育体罚法律执行执行力度的高度关注。

title: 普吉岛（Phuket）外籍人士在ATM取款时遭三名男子袭击抢劫
desc: Foreigner attacked and robbed by 3 men at Phuket ATM Legacy Phuket police are yet to issue a statement after a foreigner was attacked and robbed...
desc_original: Foreigner attacked and robbed by 3 men at Phuket ATM Legacy Phuket police are yet to issue a statement after a foreigner was attacked and robbed...
summary_cn: 一名外籍人士在普吉岛（Phuket）使用ATM机取款时遭到三名男子的暴力袭击并被抢劫。目前普吉警方尚未对此案件发表正式声明。该事件再次引发了游客对夜间取款安全的担忧，提醒在泰外籍人士注意环境安全，尤其是在偏僻区域的自动取款机附近。警方正在调取监控追踪嫌疑人。
title_cn: 普吉岛（Phuket）外籍人士在ATM取款时遭三名男子袭击抢劫

Chon Buri Provincial Police said officers launched a crackdown on a call centre scam gang after noticing suspicious behaviour involving foreign nationals withdrawing money from multiple ATMs across the Na Jomtien area. The group made 198 ATM withdrawals worth more than 4.6 million baht in total. According to police, 93 withdrawals totalling about 2.1 million baht were ma
desc_original: Russian man charged after cash withdrawals linked to call centre scam Legacy Police in Chon Buri arrested a Russian man while he was withdrawing cash linked to a call centre scam operation from an ATM in Chon Buri on March 19. Chon Buri Provincial Police said officers launched a crackdown on a call centre scam gang after noticing suspicious behaviour involving foreign nationals withdrawing money from multiple ATMs across the Na Jomtien area.
